congress_website_abstract: “The AFP Retirement and Disability Benefits Upgrade Act of 2010.” Seeks to provide adequate support and incentives to the members of the Armed Forces of the Philippines (AFP).

name: HBN-00011
congress_website_title: AN ACT IMPLEMENTING THE RIGHT OF THE PEOPLE TO INFORMATION ON MATTERS OF PUBLIC CONCERN GUARANTEED UNDER SECTION SEVEN, ARTICLE THREE OF THE 1987 CONSTITUTION AND THE STATE POLICY OF FULL PUBLIC DISCLOSURE OF ALL ITS TRANSACTIONS INVOLVING PUBLIC INTEREST UNDER SECTION TWENTY-EIGHT, ARTICLE TWO OF THE 1987 CONSTITUTION, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Freedom of Information Act of 2010.” Compels all government offices to comply with requests for information on matters of public concern.

name: HBN-00012
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR STIFFER PENALTIES FOR CRIMES RELATING TO FIREARMS AND LIGHT WEAPONS, FURTHER AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 1866, AS AMENDED BY REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8294, AND FOR RELEVANT PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to regulate the unlawful possession, manufacture, dealing in, acquisition or disposition, of firearms, ammunition and provide stiffer penalties of the same in order to effectively deter the commission of crimes with the use of firearms.

name: HBN-00013
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE SAFETY AND PROTECTION OF THE UNBORN CHILD AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Protection of the Unborn Child Act of 2010.” Aims to remedy the oversight in the statutes by recognizing that the unborn has a basic right to life and by extending the mantle of legal recognition and protection to it by defining and clarifying the basic concepts and principle of fetal development.

name: HBN-00014
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO ACCELERATE THE DEVELOPMENT OF ALL BARANGAYS BY PROVIDING FUNDS FOR MICRO ENTERPRISES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Philippine Mega-Fund for Progress Act of 2010.” Seeks to create an P80 billion Philippine Fund for Progress and allocates P2.0 million to each of the 40,000 barangays in the country for lending to deserving micro enterprises.

name: HBN-00015
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6981 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE \"WITNESS PROTECTION, SECURITY AND BENEFIT ACT\", AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Entitles witnesses admitted into the program to the following: a) hospitalization benefits while in the safehouse, and; 2) free public education for minor or dependent children from primary to college. It also seeks to provide for the perpetuation of testimonies of witnesses in consonance with Rule 134 of the Revised Rules of Court.

name: HBN-00016
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE DEPARTMENT OF INFORMATION AND COMMUNICATIONS TECHNOLOGY, DEFINING ITS POWERS AND FUNCTIONS, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Department of Information and Communications Technology Act.” Prescribes the mandate of the Department and its organizational structure, defining its task of promoting, developing and overseeing the ICT systems thus ensuring reliable and cost-efficient communications facilities and services.

name: HBN-00017
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE PHILIPPINE SOLAR INITIATIVE COMMISSION
congress_website_abstract: “The Philippine Solar Initiative Commission Act of 2010.” Seeks to establish a Philippine Solar Initiative Commission to aid in conserving solar energy to be utilized by the country.

name: HBN-00018
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTIONALIZING THE PRESCHOOL EDUCATION INTO THE BASIC EDUCATION SYSTEM AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: “Preschool Education Act.” Seeks to provide equal opportunities for all children to avail of free and compulsory preschool education that effectively promotes physical, social, intellectual, emotional and skills stimulation and values formation to sufficiently prepare them for formal elementary schooling.

name: HBN-00019
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTING A SELF-SUSTAINING FOREST MANAGEMENT PROGRAM, BY PROVIDING INCENTIVES TO TREE PLANTERS ON PRIVATE LANDS, FOREST LANDS, AND OTHER PUBLIC LANDS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Tree for Legacy Act of 2010.” Intends to encourage and empower the citizenry in sharing with the National Government and Local Government Units (LGUs) the responsibility in the management and maintenance of ecological balance within their community, use the tree resources for livelihood, finance the education of the youth and serve as legacy for future generations.

name: HBN-00020
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING ADDITIONAL POWERS TO THE PHILIPPINE HEALTH INSURANCE CORPORATION (PHILHEALTH), AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7875, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE \"NATIONAL HEALTH INSURANCE ACT OF 1995\", AS AMENDED, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Aims to expand the available categories of personal health services granted to Philhealth members and their dependents.

name: HBN-00021
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7722, ENTITLED \"AN ACT CREATING THE COMMISSION ON HIGHER EDUCATION, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES\", STRENGTHENING THE COMMISSION ON HIGHER EDUCATION (CHED), AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Higher Education Act of 2010.” Defines the composition of the commission as a collegial body independent and separate from the Department of Education (DepEd) and attached to the Office of the President for its administrative function, which covers both public and private institutions of higher education offering degree programs as well as degrees of post-secondary institutions including local government supported colleges and universities.

name: HBN-00022
congress_website_title: AN ACT IMPLEMENTING THE RIGHT OF ACCESS TO INFORMATION ON MATTERS OF PUBLIC CONCERN GUARANTEED UNDER SECTION TWENTY-EIGHT, ARTICLE II AND SECTION SEVEN, ARTICLE III OF THE 1987 CONSTITUTION AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Freedom of Information Act of 2010.” Mandates for the electronic/digital publication of government documents considered as matters of public concern for the purpose of facilitating a more efficient communication between the people and government agencies and thus making easy access to information for students through the internet without having to go through all the red tape associated with government.

name: HBN-00023
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A MAGNA CARTA OF THE POOR
congress_website_abstract: “Magna Carta of the Poor.” Defines the basic rights of the poor, to wit: a) the right to food; b) the right to employment and livelihood; c) the right to quality education; d) the right to shelter; and e) the right to basic health services and medicine.

name: HBN-00024
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A FOOD SUBSIDY FOR THE POOR PROGRAM, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Food for the Poor Act of 2010.” Provides an opportunity for the poor to obtain food through the issuance of a food allotment through food certificates.

name: HBN-00025
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTIONALIZING A PRE-SCHOOL PROGRAM IN THE PUBLIC EDUCATION SYSTEM AND INTEGRATING VALUES FORMATION INTO THE CURRICULUM OF PUBLIC PRE-SCHOOL, ELEMENTARY AND HIGH SCHOOL EDUCATION
congress_website_abstract: Directs the Department of Education (DepEd) to design a pre-school program that shall be made part of the curriculum of public schools and shall be considered as a requisite to elementary education.

congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 26, CHAPTER 4, BOOK VI OF EXECUTIVE ORDER NUMBERED 292, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE \"ADMINISTRATIVE CODE OF 1987\"

congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE NATIONAL DEFENSE AND SECURITY OF THE REPUBLIC OF THE PHILIPPINES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE METROPOLITAN VIGAN HERITAGE DEVELOPMENT AUTHORITY, DEFINING ITS POWER AND FUNCTIONS, PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFORE

name: HBN-00003
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING TUITION FEE DISCOUNTS AND SCHOLARSHIP GRANTS TO QUALIFIED HOUSEHOLD HELPERS NATIONWIDE, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Household Help Scholarship Act Grants of 2010.” Institutionalizes the grants of tuition fee discounts and scholarships to qualified and deserving household helpers who can not possibly afford quality education with their meager and below minimum salaries.

name: HBN-00004
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING BENEFITS AD INCENTIVES TO ACCREDITED DAY CARE WORKERS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6972 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE BARANGAY-LEVEL TOTAL DEVELOPMENT AND PROTECTION OF CHILDREN ACT
congress_website_abstract: Grants day care workers a monthly salary, overtime pay, hazard pay, leave credits, and medical, insurance and retirement benefits.

name: HBN-00005
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE SPECIAL ECONOMIC ZONE AND FREEPORT IN THE PROVINCE OF ILOCOS SUR, CREATING FOR THIS PURPOSE THE ILOCOS SUR SPECIAL ECONOMIC ZONE AND FREEPORT AUTHORITY, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00026
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING AND PROVIDING FOR FREE COLLEGE EDUCATION IN INFORMATION AND COMMUNICATIONS TECHNOLOGY AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Free Information and Communications College Education Act of 2010.” Provides free college education in Information and Communications Technology (ICT), a two-year college degree course, to all high school graduates of public schools.

name: HBN-00027
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A FREE BREAKFAST PROGRAM FOR PUBLIC SCHOOL CHILDREN IN DAY CARE CENTERS, PRE-SCHOOLS AND ELEMENTARY SCHOOLS IN THE COUNTRY AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: Institutionalizes the free breakfast program which shall consist of fortified instant noodles or iron-fortified rice or fortified biscuits or any other appropriate form to address hunger primarily and malnutrition secondarily.

name: HBN-00028
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING SECURITY OF TENURE UNDER CERTAIN CONDITIONS TO GOVERNMENT EMPLOYEES WHOSE NATURE OF APPOINTMENT IS EITHER TEMPORARY OR CONTRACTUAL AND WHO HAVE RENDERED A TOTAL OF TEN (10) YEARS OF EFFICIENT SERVICE
congress_website_abstract: Accords regular positions with permanent appointments to government employees holding contractual and/or temporary positions in the first and second levels and who have rendered continuous service for at least ten (10) years.

name: HBN-00029
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE DEVELOPMENT OF ENTREPRENEURSHIP SKILLS AMONG GOVERNMENT EMPLOYEES FOR AN INNOVATION-INSPIRED CORPS OF CIVIL SERVANTS AND A PRODUCTIVE POST-SERVICE CITIZENRY
congress_website_abstract: “Government Employees´ Entrepreneurship Development Act of 2010.” Directs all government offices and agencies to prepare a post-service Entrepreneurship Development Program (EDP) designed to help employees learn what they need to know to develop ideas and actualize them into successful businesses and how to increase entrepreneurial opportunities in their respective municipalities, provinces and regions.

name: HBN-00030
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONSIDERING RICE/CORN HOARDING AND PROFITEERING DURING OR ON THE OCCASION OF ANY CALAMITY OR EMERGENCY DECLARED AS SUCH BY THE PRESIDENT AS EQUIVALENT TO ECONOMIC SABOTAGE, PARTLY AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7581 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE PRICE ACT, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Anti-Rice/Corn Hoarding and Profiteering Act of 2010.” Upgrades the seriousness of the prohibited act of rice and corn hoarding to emphasize its highly destructive effect on people´s lives more than justify its increased penal sanction.

name: HBN-00031
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING ALL GOVERNMENT OFFICES TO ENSURE THE RELEASE OF THE RETIREMENT BENEFITS OF ITS EMPLOYEES WITHIN FIFTEEN (15) DAYS FROM RETIREMENT
congress_website_abstract: Directs the heads of all government instrumentalities to ensure the release of the retirement benefits and gratuities of an employee within fifteen (15) days from the date of retirement.

name: HBN-00032
title: DUMALAG LAND TRANSPORTATION DISTRICT OFFICE
long_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A REGULAR DISTRICT OFFICE OF THE LAND TRANSPORTATION OFFICE IN DUMALAG, CAPIZ AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A REGULAR DISTRICT OFFICE OF THE LAND TRANSPORTATION OFFICE IN DUMALAG, CAPIZ AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00033
congress_website_title: AN ACT REVISING THE BUDGET AND NATIONAL EXPENDITURE PROCESS IN ORDER THAT CONGRESS RE-ACQUIRES THE ULTIMATE RESPONSIBILITY FOR THE PREPARATION, LEGISLATION, EXECUTION, AND ACCOUNTABILITY OF THE NATIONAL BUDGET
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to restore the “power of the purse” to the Legislative Branch of the Government thus reestablishing the equal system of checks and balances in the National Budget process by amending Presidential Decree No. 1177.

congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING AUGUST 25 OF EVERY YEAR A SPECIAL NONWORKING PUBLIC HOLIDAY IN THE CITY OF GAPAN, PROVINCE OF NUEVA ECIJA

name: HBN-00035
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO PROTECT ALL AGRICULTURAL LANDS FROM INDISCRIMINATE LAND CONVERSION AMENDING SECTION 20 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE
congress_website_abstract: “Agricultural Land Protection (ALP) Law.” Requires the approval of the Department of Agriculture (DA) and the Department of Agrarian Reform (DAR) before the approval of a land conversion application by amending Section 20 of the Local Government Code.

name: HBN-00036
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE JAEN - SAN ANTONIO - ZARAGOZA ROAD IN THE MUNICIPALITIES OF JAEN AND SAN ANTONIO, PROVINCE OF NUEVA ECIJA INTO A NATIONAL ROAD

name: HBN-00038
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING RETIREMENT, HEALTH CARE AND DEATH BENEFITS TO PROFESSIONAL FILIPINO ATHLETES WHO WIN WORLD CHAMPIONSHIP TITLES IN INTERNATIONAL PROFESSIONAL SPORTS COMPETITIONS OR IN OTHER EQUALLY PRESTIGIOUS INTERNATIONAL CHAMPIONSHIP GAMES AND PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: “Professional Filipino Athletes Retirement, Health Care and Death Benefits Act of 2010.” Seeks to extend monthly pensions and other privileges to Filipino professional athletes who became world champions at one time in their lives.

name: HBN-00039
congress_website_title: AN ACT REGULATING THE BUSINESS OPERATION OF MOTORCYCLES-FOR-HIRE AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Motorcycle-For-Hire Act of 2010.” Grants the local government units (LGUs) the power to regulate the operation of motorcycle-for-hire in their areas of jurisdiction.

name: HBN-00040
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING THE MAGNA CARTA FOR DAY CARE WORKERS, PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Magna Carta for Day Care Workers (Teachers/Nannies).” Seeks to enshrine the fundamental rights of day care workers by instituting a magna carta for day care workers.

name: HBN-00041
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A CRISIS CENTER FOR STREET CHILDREN IN EVERY REGION OF THE PHILIPPINES, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Street Children Crisis Center Act of 2010.” Mandates the Department of Social Welfare and Development (DSWD) to extend assistance to street children through its “Lingap” (care) Centers which implements a program aimed at developing the children´s potentials and reviving their hope for a better future.

name: HBN-00042
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING TWO (2) ADDITIONAL BRANCHES OF THE REGIONAL TRIAL COURT IN THE PROVINCE OF SOUTH COTABATO AND GENERAL SANTOS CITY, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE \"BATAS PAMBANSA BLG. 129, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE JUDICIARY REORGANIZATION ACT OF 1980\" AS AMENDED, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00043
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING A COMPREHENSIVE NATIONAL LOAN PROGRAM FOR COLLEGE EDUCATION AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: “Comprehensive National Loan Program for College Education Act of 2010.” Seeks to revitalize the government´s educational assistance program to increase the prospect of the poor but deserving students of acquiring quality education and training needed to uplift not only their own lot but that of their family and communities as well.

name: HBN-00044
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTING REFORMS IN LAND ADMINISTRATION
congress_website_abstract: “The Land Administration Reform Act of 2010.” Aims to upgrade, systematize and integrate the administration, management and operations of the country's land resources.

name: HBN-00045
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR SUSTAINABLE FOREST MANAGEMENT
congress_website_abstract: \"Sustainable Forest Management Act of 2010.\" Provides for the limits and classification of forest lands; administration and management of these lands; reforestation program; forest protection; forestry research, education, training and extension; disposition and utilization of forest resources; forest charges, fees and rentals; and criminals offenses and penalties.

name: HBN-00066
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO STRENGTHEN AND ENHANCE THE USE OF ENGLISH AS THE MEDIUM OF INSTRUCTION IN PHILIPPINE SCHOOLS
congress_website_abstract: “Strengthening and Enhancing the Use of English as the Medium of Instruction Act.” Aims to improve the total learning process in the country´s educational system towards more valuable education for the students and stauncher preparation for their successful entrance in the corporate and industrial stage of the global commercial theater.

name: HBN-00067
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE PHILIPPINE MORINGA RESEARCH AND DEVELOPMENT AUTHORITY (PMRDA) TO ENABLE THE GOVERNMENT TO SUPPORT, OVERSEE AND ASSIST THE STRATEGIC, COORDINATED AND COMPREHENSIVE DEVELOPMENT PROGRAM OF THE MORINGA (MALUNGGAY) INDUSTRY IN ALL ITS ASPECTS; AND TO ENHANCE THE CAPACITIES AND SOCIO-ECONOMIC WELFARE OF MORINGA FARMERS, PRODUCERS, BY-PRODUCT MANUFACTURERS AND ALL THOSE DIRECTLY AND INDIRECTLY ENGAGED IN ALL ASPECTS OF THE MORINGA INDUSTRY BY ASSISTING AND PROVIDING EDUCATION, SERVICE, DEVELOPMENT, FINANCING, GATHERING INDUSTRY INFORMATION/PRODUCER AND CONSUMER INFORMATION, RESEARCH PROMOTION, AND TO DEVELOP GLOBALLY COMPETITIVE PRODUCTS REQUIRED TO MAINTAIN NATIONAL SELF SUFFICIENCY AND EXPORT CAPACITY MARKETS FOR MORINGA AND MORINGA BY-PRODUCTS
congress_website_abstract: “The Philippine Moringa Research and Development Authority (PMRDA).” Seeks to recognize Moringa Oleifera (malunggay) tree as one of the most important plants in the country that deserves national and international promotion and support due to the many bio-medical endowments and numerous socio-economic benefits that can be derived from it.

name: HBN-00068
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO ESTABLISH THE CAMARINES SUR BAMBUSETUM THAT SHALL CONTRIBUTE TO THE EX SITU CONSERVATION OF PHILIPPINE BAMBOO SPECIES AND TO ASSEMBLE IN A SELECTED SITE OR SITES IN THE PROVINCE OF CAMARINES SUR A COLLECTION OF TROPICAL AND SUBTROPICAL BAMBOO TAXONS FROM OTHER PARTS OF THE WORLD AND, TO THE EXTENT PRACTICABLE, TO ADAPT TO THE PHILIPPINE CLIMATE SOME TEMPERATE BAMBOO TAXONS THAT CAN SURVIVE AND BE PROPAGATED IN THE PHILIPPINES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00069
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A WATER HYACINTH RESEARCH AND DEVELOPMENT CENTER IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CANAMAN, PROVINCE OF CAMARINES SUR, ALLOCATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00070
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE ROAD NETWORK LINKING THE MUNICIPALITY OF BOMBON TO THE CITY OF NAGA IN THE PROVINCE OF CAMARINES SUR, CONSISTING OF THE PROVINCIAL ROAD PASSING THROUGH BARANGAYS SAN ISIDRO, SAN ANTONIO AND SIEMBRE AND THE NATIONAL ROADS LINKING AND TRAVERSING BARANGAYS SIEMBRE, PACOL, SAN FELIPE, LIBOTON, BAGUMBAYAN NORTE, HARING, SAN AGUSTIN, BARAS, SAN FRANCISCO, STO. TOMAS, SAN MIGUEL, SAN PANTALEON, SAN ISIDRO, SAN JUAN, MONSERAT, SAN ROQUE AND SAN ISIDRO INTO A NATIONAL CIRCUMFERENTIAL ROAD

name: HBN-00071
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE WELFARE OF BARANGAY TANODS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 393 OF THE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991
congress_website_abstract: “Barangay Tanod Welfare Act.” Aims to encourage and recognize the Barangay Tanods in the country for their selfless effort to maintain the peace and tranquility in their communities by granting them benefits in the form of Christmas bonus, insurance coverage, free medical care, etc.

name: HBN-00072
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING A MECHANISM FOR GENERATING QUALITY GRADUATES OF HIGHER EDUCATION INSTITUTIONS BASED ON PERFORMANCE IN PROFESSIONAL LICENSURE EXAMINATIONS
congress_website_abstract: “Professional Examination Zero-Performance Policy Act.” Revokes permanently government recognition and/or permit to operate pertinent and related professional courses by any higher education institution whether public or private, whose graduates have registered zero-performance in any professional board or bar examination in three (3) out of five (5) consecutive times they participated in.

name: HBN-00073
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING EMPLOYERS IN THE PRIVATE SECTOR TO HAVE IN THEIR EMPLOY DISABLED PERSONS, AND PROVIDING ADDITIONAL INCENTIVE THEREFOR, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SEVENTY-TWO SEVENTY-SEVEN OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE MAGNA CARTA FOR DISABLED PERSONS
congress_website_abstract: Requires private employers to hire disabled persons who have qualified in accordance with the provision of RA07277 and other applicable labor laws, and for such employed persons to constitute a minimum percentage of their total work forces.

name: HBN-00074
congress_website_title: AN ACT PENALIZING PARENTS, ADOPTERS, GUARDIANS OR PERSONS EXERCISING SPECIAL OR SUBSTITUTE PARENTAL AUTHORITY OVER CHILDREN UNDER PARENTAL AUTHORITY FOUND TO BE ENGAGED IN BEGGING AND/OR PROSTITUTION AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Parental Sanction Law for Child Begging and Prostitution.” Seeks to elevate the dignity of the child as well as the parents who nurture the upbringing of the child, measured in terms of he capacity to give love and care without exploitation.

name: HBN-00075
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF A SCHOOL BUILDING IN EVERY BARANGAY IN THE PHILIPPINES, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Barangay School Building Act of 2010.” Mandates the Department of Education (DepEd), in coordination with the Department of Public Works and Highways (DPWH) and the Department of Budget Management (DBM) to formulate a guideline of requirements and to structure a timetable to ensure that every barangay in the country will have its school building by the end of 2013.

name: HBN-00076
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE MODERNIZATION OF THE GOVERNMENT ARSENAL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: “Government Arsenal Modernization Act.” Seeks to modernize the government arsenal by empowering it to become more productive thus achieving self-reliance in the production of munitions for the country´s armed forces.

name: HBN-00077
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A SECONDARY NATIONAL TECHNICAL-VOCATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY TALISAY, CITY OF BALANGA, PROVINCE OF BATAAN, TO BE KNOWN AS BALANGA CITY NATIONAL TECHNICAL-VOCATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00078
title: MARIVELES DISTRICT HOSPITAL
long_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE MARIVELES DISTRICT HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MARIVELES, PROVINCE OF BATAAN AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE MARIVELES DISTRICT HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MARIVELES, PROVINCE OF BATAAN, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00079
title: BALANGA CITY SPORTS CENTER
long_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF A MULTIPURPOSE SPORTS CENTER IN THE CITY OF BALANGA, PROVINCE OF BATAAN TO BE KNOWN AS THE 'BALANGA CITY SPORTS CENTER' AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF A MULTI-PURPOSE SPORTS CENTER IN THE CITY OF BALANGA, PROVINCE OF BATAAN, TO BE KNOWN AS \"BALANGA CITY SPORTS CENTER\" AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00080
title: JUSTICE EMILIO ANGELES GANCAYCO MEMORIAL HIGH SCHOOL
long_title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF ORION NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY BALAGTAS, MUNICIPALITY OF ORION, PROVINCE OF BATAAN TO JUSTICE EMILIO ANGELES GANCAYCO MEMORIAL HIGH SCHOOL
congress_website_title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF ORION NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ORION, PROVINCE OF BATAAN, TO JUSTICE EMILIO ANGELES GANCAYCO MEMORIAL HIGH SCHOOL

name: HBN-00081
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO REDUCE POVERTY AND PROMOTE HUMAN CAPITAL DEVELOPMENT THROUGH THE CREATION OF A NATIONAL CONDITIONAL FUND TRANSFER PROGRAM
congress_website_abstract: “Pantawid Pamilyang Pilipino Program Act of 2010.” Defines the program (4Ps) to mean the national poverty reduction strategy that provides conditional cash transfer to extremely poor households to improve their health, nutrition and education, particularly of children aged zero (0) to fourteen (14).

name: HBN-00082
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING AT LEAST ONE (1) SPECIAL EDUCATION CENTER FOR EACH SCHOOL DIVISION AND AT LEAST THREE (3) SPECIAL EDUCATION CENTERS IN BIG SCHOOL DIVISIONS FOR CHILDREN WITH SPECIAL NEEDS, GUIDELINES FOR GOVERNMENT FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE AND OTHER INCENTIVES AND SUPPORT
congress_website_abstract: “Special Education Act of 1020.” Mandates the creation of at least one (1) special education (SPED) center in each city and province and three (3) centers in big school divisions in the country to ensure nationwide availability of special education services.

name: HBN-00083
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 996, AS AMENDED, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to help prevent transmittal of the Hepatitis-B virus to newborns through mandatory vaccination within twelve (12) hours from birth.

name: HBN-00084
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR SUSTAINABLE FOREST MANAGEMENT
congress_website_abstract: “Sustainable Forest Management Act of 2010.” Adopts the following strategies to fulfill the objectives relative to the conservation and management of forestlands and their resources, to wit: 1) watershed as the basic forestland management unit; 2) multi-sectoral participation; 3) community-based forest management as a principal strategy; 4) protection of forestlands and natural resources as priority concern; 5) reforestation as a priority measure; 6) security of tenure of stakeholders; and, 7) professionalism in the forest service.

name: HBN-00085
congress_website_title: AN ACT DEFINING CYBERCRIME, PROVIDING FOR THE PREVENTION, INVESTIGATION AND IMPOSITION OF PENALTIES THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Cybercrime Prevention Act of 2010.” Harmonizes the country´s laws with that of the Convention on Cybercrime adopted in Budapist in 2001 to facilitate international cooperation on the prevention of the crimes stated and clarifies cybercrime in the following categories: 1) offenses against confidentiality, integrity and availability of computer data systems; 2) Computer-related offenses; and, 3) content-related offenses.

name: HBN-00126
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING TWO (2) ADDITIONAL TRIAL COURT BRANCHES IN COMPOSTELA VALLEY PROVINCE TO BE LOCATED IN THE MUNICIPALITIES OF COMPOSTELA AND MABINI, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION FOURTEEN (14) OF BATAS PAMBANSA BLG. 129 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE JUDICIARY REORGANIZATION ACT OF 1980

name: HBN-00127
congress_website_title: AN ACT IMPOSING AN EXCISE TAX, TO BE KNOWN AS 'ENVIRONMENTAL LEVY' ON THE USE OF PLASTIC BAGS IN SHOPS, SUPERMARKETS, SERVICE STATIONS, STORES AND/OR SALES OUTLETS, CREATING THE ENVIRONMENTAL PROTECTION SUPPORT FUND, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Discourages the use of plastic bags through the imposition of an \"environment\" levy that shall be specifically used to fund efforts to protect the environment.

name: HBN-00128
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING PUBLIC ELEMENTARY AND HIGH SCHOOL TEACHERS NON-WAGE BENEFITS IN THE FORM OF FREE TERTIARY EDUCATION IN ANY STATE COLLEGE OR UNIVERSITY FOR ONE (1) DEPENDENT CHILD, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Extends additional benefit to public elementary and secondary public school teachers in the form of educational grant to one dependent child attending any state university or college and if both spouses are public school teachers, two (2) dependent children shall be covered by the grant.

name: HBN-00129
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE SALARY AND COMPENSATION OF PUBLIC ELEMENTARY AND SECONDARY SCHOOL TEACHERS BY PROVIDING AN ADDITIONAL ALLOWANCE TO BE KNOWN AS 'ANTI-POVERTY ALLOWANCE', APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR SUCH OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Grants public elementary and secondary school teachers an additional allowance of P5,000 monthly to be known as \"anti-poverty allowance.\"

name: HBN-00130
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING TITLE VI OF E.O. No. 2009 AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE FAMILY CODE BY REMOVING AND/OR ERASING DISTINCTIONS BETWEEN LEGITIMATE, ILLEGITIMATE AND LEGITIMATED FILIATION, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Grants all children the following rights: 1) to bear the surname of the father and mother in conformity with the provisions of the Civil Code and special laws; 2) to receive support from their parents, their descendants and in proper cases, their brothers and sisters; and 3) to be entitled to legitimate and other successional rights without any distinction whatsoever.

name: HBN-00131
congress_website_title: AN ACT OTHERWISE KNOWN AS VOLUNTARY INFORMATION PERSONAL CARD SYSTEM 'VIP' TO BE IMPLEMENTED BY THE NATIONAL STATISTICS OFFICE (NSO), APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Institutionalizes a national voluntary information protection card to be known as \"VIP Card\" in order to facilitate and streamline governmental transactions, cut red tape and increase productivity.

name: HBN-00132
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR PROTECTION, SECURITY AND BENEFITS OF WHISTLEBLOWERS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Whistleblower Act of 2010.\" Seeks to set up a system of rewards and protection for whistleblowers and their families.

name: HBN-00133
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO ENSURE PUBLIC ACCESS TO OFFICIAL RECORDS, DOCUMENTS AND ANY OTHER INFORMATION OF PUBLIC CONCERN
congress_website_abstract: “An Act to Ensure Public Access to Official Records, Documents and Any Other Information of Public Concern” or “Freedom of Information Act.” Compels all government offices to comply with requests for information on matters of public concern.

name: HBN-00134
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 7 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8794 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS AN ACT IMPOSING A MOTOR VEHICLE USER'S CHARGE ON OWNERS OF ALL TYPES OF MOTOR VEHICLES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to amend Section 7 of RA08794 with the end in view of ensuring a more transparent disbursement of the monies collected from vehicle owners so that Motor Vehicles User´s Charge (MVUC) will be used to improve motoring in the country.

name: HBN-00135
congress_website_title: AN ACT MERGING THE LANDBANK OF THE PHILIPPINES AND THE DEVELOPMENT BANK OF THE PHILIPPINES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Authorizes the merger of the Landbank of the Philippines and the Development Bank of the Philippines, with the Landbank as the surviving entity, being the larger bank in terms of assets and resources.

name: HBN-00136
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9340, RESETTING THE BARANGAY AND SANGGUNIANG KABATAAN ELECTIONS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to postpone the barangay and sangguniang kabataan elections to the second Monday of May 2012.

name: HBN-00137
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTIONS 284 AND 393 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS 'THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991'
congress_website_abstract: Increases the Internal Revenue Allotment (IRA) to forty-one (41%) per cent, one (1%) per cent of which shall be solely dedicated to the Barangay Retirement Funds for the retirement of barangay officials, whether elected or appointed, including the barangay tanods, health workers, day care workers and members of the lupon.

name: HBN-00138
congress_website_title: AN ACT IMPOSING A SEVEN PERCENT COMPUTER EDUCATION TAX ON RECEIPTS (EXCLUDING VALUE-ADDED TAX) FROM CELLULAR PHONE CALLS TO BE BORNE BY CELLULAR PHONE COMPANIES, CREATING A SPECIAL COMPUTER LITERACY EDUCATION FUND FOR PUBLIC SCHOOLS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Imposes a seven (7%) per cent computer education tax on receipts (including value-added tax) from cellular phone calls, especially those from blocked calls and dropped calls caused by the inefficiency of mobile phone operators, to be borne by cellular phone companies, to start-up and finance the computer literacy education program in public schools nationwide.

name: HBN-00139
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9164, AS AMENDED, RESETTING THE BARANGAY AND SANGGUNIANG KABATAAN ELECTIONS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to postpone the barangay and sangguniang kabataan elections to the last Monday of October 2011.

name: HBN-00140
congress_website_title: AN ACT EMPOWERING THE PUNONG BARANGAY TO ADMINISTER OATH OF OFFICE TO ANY GOVERNMENT OFFICIAL, INCLUDING THE PRESIDENT OF THE REPUBLIC OF THE PHILIPPINES, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 420 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991
congress_website_abstract: Gives the incoming President of the Republic wider latitude or great opportunity to choose from among the public officials, who will administer oath to His Excellency thus giving due recognition to the untiring support extended by punong barangays to the President.

name: HBN-00141
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE TAAL LAKE DEVELOPMENT AUTHORITY, PRESCRIBING ITS POWERS, FUNCTIONS AND DUTIES, PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00142
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING AN ADDITIONAL BRANCH OF THE REGIONAL TRIAL COURTS IN THE CITY OF TANAUAN, PROVINCE OF BATANGAS, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00143
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6734 ENTITLED 'AN ACT PROVIDING FOR AN ORGANIC ACT FOR THE AUTONOMOUS REGION IN MUSLIM MINDANAO AS AMENDED BY REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9054, PROVIDING FOR THE CREATION OF THE AUTONOMOUS REGION IN SOUTHWESTERN MINDANAO AND THE AUTONOMOUS REGION IN CENTRAL MINDANAO

name: HBN-00144
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE MAPUN SPECIALTY HOSPITAL FOR LEPROSY IN THE ISLAND MUNICIPALITY OF MAPUN, PROVINCE OF TAWI-TAWI, INTEGRATING THERETO THE CAGAYAN DE TAWI-TAWI DISTRICT HOSPITAL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00145
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING THE TURTLE ISLANDS LOCATED IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TURTLE ISLANDS, PROVINCE OF TAWI-TAWI, AS A PROTECTED AREA

name: HBN-00046
congress_website_title: AN ACT FURTHER STRENGTHENING THE ANTI-SMUGGLING MECHANISM, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE CERTAIN PROVISIONS OF PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 1464, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE TARIFF AND CUSTOMS CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES, AS AMENDED, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Anti-Smuggling Act of 2010.” Seeks to curb smuggling, both technical and outright, by providing systemic solutions that will make it easier to detect smuggling.

name: HBN-00047
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING CERTAIN PROVISIONS OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8293 ENTITLED, \"AN ACT PRESCRIBING THE INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY CODE AND ESTABLISHING THE INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY OFFICE, PROVIDING FOR ITS POWERS AND FUNCTIONS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to amend the Intellectual Property Code through the integration of comprehensive, swift, efficient and adequate strategies designed to respond to the criminal onslaught of internet piracy.

name: HBN-00048
congress_website_title: AN ACT IMPROVING PHILIPPINE COMMITMENT TO HUMAN RIGHTS PROMOTION AND PROTECTION BY PROVIDING THE NECESSARY MECHANISMS FOR THE PREVENTION OF THE OCCURRENCE AND THE PROTECTION FROM THE ADVERSE EFFECTS OF INTERNAL DISPLACEMENT AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Internal Displacement Act of 2010.” Establishes mechanisms that will: a) prevent the occurrence of internal displacement; b) protect internally displaced persons (IDDs) during displacement; c) address the continuing need of displaced communities; d) provide assistance during the return, resettlement or local integration of IDDs; and e) provide compensation.

name: HBN-00049
congress_website_title: AN ACT STRENGTHENING THE POLITICAL PARTY SYSTEM, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"The Political Party Development Act of 2010\". Strengthens political parties by introducing reforms in campaign financing and providing financial subsidies to political parties to augment their expenditures for campaign, provides sanctions against any member of a national political party who changes party affiliation after being nominated by the political party otherwise known as political turncoats.

name: HBN-00050
congress_website_title: AN ACT REGULATING THE ESTABLISHMENT AND OPERATIONS OF HEALTH MAINTENANCE ORGANIZATIONS (HMOs), AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Health Maintenance Organization Act of 2010.” Encourages the establishment and operation of health maintenance organizations (HMOs) by granting them reasonable incentives; establishes the regulatory framework for HMOs; and recognizes and protects the rights of HMOs, health care providers and members.

name: HBN-00051
congress_website_title: AN ACT EXPANDING THE PROHIBITED ACTS OF DISCRIMINATION AGAINST WOMEN ON ACCOUNT OF SEX, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE ARTICLES 135 AND 137 OF PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 442 AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LABOR CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES.
congress_website_abstract: Expands the scope of prohibited acts of discrimination against women to include: a) giving preference to a male employee over a female employee in the hiring process; and b) favoring a male employee over a female with respect to dismissal of personnel.

name: HBN-00052
congress_website_title: AN ACT EXPANDING AND UPGRADING THE NORTHERN MINDANAO MEDICAL CENTER IN CAGAYAN DE ORO CITY, FROM A THREE HUNDRED-BED CAPACITY HOSPITAL INTO A FIVE HUNDRED-BED CAPACITY HOSPITAL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFORE

name: HBN-00053
congress_website_title: AN ACT IMPLEMENTING THE RIGHT OF THE PEOPLE TO INFORMATION ON MATTERS OF PUBLIC CONCERN GUARANTEED UNDER SECTION SEVEN, ARTICLE THREE OF THE 1987 CONSTITUTION AND THE STATE POLICY OF FULL PUBLIC DISCLOSURE OF ALL ITS TRANSACTIONS INVOLVING PUBLIC INTEREST UNDER SECTION TWENTY-EIGHT, ARTICLE TWO OF THE 1987 CONSTITUTION, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Freedom of Information Act of 2010.” Provides for an expansive scope in terms of government agencies as well as information covered; clear, uniform and speedy procedure for access to information; proscription against excessive costs of access to information; system of accessible and speedy remedies that a citizen who has been denied access to information may resort to; mandate to promote a culture of openness within the government , and clear administrative, criminal and civil liability for violation of the right to information.

name: HBN-00054
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING COMPENSATION TO VICTIMS OF HUMAN RIGHTS VIOLATIONS DURING THE MARCOS REGIME, DOCUMENTATION OF SAID VIOLATIONS, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Compensation Act to Victims of Human Rights Violations.” Institutionalizes formal and legal processes of giving compensation to victims of human rights during the Marcos regime, the funds of which shall be sourced from the estate of the Marcoses declared as ill-gotten wealth by the government.

name: HBN-00055
congress_website_title: AN ACT STRENGTHENING THE COMMISSION ON HUMAN RIGHTS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Commission of Human Rights Act of 2010.” Define the mandate of the Commission on Human Rights to include investigative, monitoring and advocacy powers and functions; empower the Commission by elaborating on its concurrent prosecutorial powers and functions, and provide rules of procedure for the exercise thereof; and, delineate the structural and organizational structure of the Commission as a collegial body with the corresponding powers and functions ascribed unto each office, and the pertinent ranks and qualifications of every officer therein.

name: HBN-00056
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A FRAMEWORK FOR RESPONSIBLE AND ACCOUNTABLE TRADE NEGOTIATIONS 'BY CREATING THE PHILIPPINE TRADE REPRESENTATIVE OFFICE, APPROPRIATNG FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Charter of the Philippine Trade Representative Office.” Provides for the establishment of the Philippine Trade Representative Office and for the duties and responsibilities of the Philippine Trade Representative who principally handles the country´s trade and investment agreements.

name: HBN-00057
title: MARINE AND COASTAL RESOURCES PROTECTION ACT OF 2011
long_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING MARINE PROTECTED AREAS IN ALL COASTAL MUNICIPALITIES AND CITIES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING MARINE PROTECTED AREAS IN ALL COASTAL MUNICIPALITIES AND CITIES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Marine and Coastal Resources Protection Act of 2010.” Establishes at least one (1) marine protected area (MPA) in every coastal municipality in the country. The MPA shall be used to conserve biodiversity, manage natural resources, protect endangered species, reduce user conflicts, provide educational and research opportunities and enhance recreational fisheries.

name: HBN-00058
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING THE RIGHT OF REPLY AND PROVIDING PENALTIES IN VIOLATION THEREOF
congress_website_abstract: Grants right to reply to any persons accused directly or indirectly committing, having committed or of intending to commit any crime or offense defined by law are criticized by innuendo, suggestion or rumor for any lapse in behavior in public or private life, to charges committed in all forms of mass media, websites or through any electronic device.

name: HBN-00059
congress_website_title: AN ACT IMPLEMENTING THE RIGHT OF THE PEOPLE TO INFORMATION ON MATTERS OF PUBLIC CONCERN GUARANTEED UNDER SECTION SEVEN, ARTICLE THREE OF THE 1987 CONSTITUTION AND THE STATE POLICY OF FULL PUBLIC DISCLOSURE OF ALL ITS TRANSACTIONS INVOLVING PUBLIC INTEREST UNDER SECTION TWENTY-EIGHT, ARTICLE TWO OF THE 1987 CONSTITUTION, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Freedom of Information Act of 2010.” Implements the right of the people to information on matters of public concern as well as adopts the policy of public disclosure of all transactions in government involving public interest as guaranteed in the 1987 Constitution.

name: HBN-00060
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING TWO ADDITIONAL BRANCHES OF THE REGIONAL TRIAL COURT IN THE CITY OF DAVAO, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE BATAS PAMBANSA BLG 129, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS \"JUDICIARY REORGANIZATION ACT OF 1980,\" AS AMENDED, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00061
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A COMPREHENSIVE REVISION OF THE CHARTER OF THE BANGKO SENTRAL NG PILIPINAS (BSP)BY AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SEVENTY-SIX HUNDRED AND FIFTY-THREE ENTITLED \"THE NEW CENTRAL BANK ACT\"
congress_website_abstract: Directs the National Government to pay in cash available to the Government or through the issuance of readily marketable government securities of equivalent market value to settle the balance of P40 Billion unpaid subscription of the Government to the Bangko Sentral, among other proposed amendments in the measure.

name: HBN-00062
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9340, RESETTING THE SYNCHRONIZED BARANGAY AND SANGGUNIANG KABATAAN ELECTIONS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Resets the synchronized barangay and sangguniang kabataan elections scheduled on last Monday of October 2010 to the second Monday of May 2011 and every three (3) years thereafter.

name: HBN-00063
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO INSTITUTIONALIZE PRESCHOOL EDUCATION BY INCORPORATING KINDER 1 FOR 3 TO 4 YEARS OLD, KINDER 2 FOR 5 YEARS OLD, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: “Preschool Education Act of 1020.” Seeks to create a two-level compulsory preparatory public education which will be named: Kindergarten 1 (Kinder 1) which will be provided by the converted Day Care Centers into Community Preschools financed in part by their respective Local Government Units (LGUs) with assistance from the Local School Board among other stakeholders; and Kindergarten 2 (Kinder 2) which will be provided by the public elementary schools under the Department of Education (DepEd).

name: HBN-00064
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE DEPARTMENT OF INFORMATION AND COMMUNICATIONS TECHNOLOGY, DEFINING ITS POWERS AND FUNCTIONS, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Department of Information and Communications Technology Act.” Seeks the creation of the Department that will be responsible for providing the policy and legal environment and the institutional mechanisms that will promote the development of information and communication technology in the country.

name: HBN-00065
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING A DEPARTMENT OF AQUACULTURE AND FISHERIES RESOURCES, PROVIDING FOR ITS POWERS AND FUNCTIONS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Department of Aquaculture and Fisheries Resources Act of 2010.\" Provides for the transfer of the powers and functions, appropriations, records, properties, equipment and personnel of agencies involved in aquaculture, fisheries and marine resources from the Department of Agriculture and other related agencies to the proposed Department.

name: HBN-00086
congress_website_title: AN ACT IMPLEMENTING THE RIGHT OF ACCESS TO INFORMATION ON MATTERS OF PUBLIC CONCERN GUARANTEED UNDER SECTION TWENTY-EIGHT, ARTICLE II AND SECTION SEVEN, ARTICLE III OF THE 1987 CONSTITUTION AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Freedom of Information Act of 2010.” Recognizes the right of the people to information on matters of public concern to include access to official records, documents and papers pertaining to official acts, transactions, or decisions, as well as to government research data used as basis for policy development, subject to the limitations as may be provided by law.

name: HBN-00087
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO ENSURE THAT EVERY FILIPINO IS GRANTED WITH BASIC HEALTHCARE SERVICES, PROVIDING FOR THE PURPOSE A MANDATORY UNIVERSAL HEALTHCARE COVERAGE, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Mandatory Universal Healthcare Coverage of Every Filipino Act.” Provides for automatic enrolment of all Filipinos which shall be funded by the national government through the inclusion of the required contribution in the annual General Appropriations Act.

name: HBN-00088
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8545, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE \"EXPANDED GOVERNMENT ASSISTANCE TO STUDENTS AND TEACHERS IN PRIVATE EDUCATION ACT\" PROVIDING FOR AN EXPANDED VOUCHER OR COUPON SYSTEM IN SECONDARY AND TERTIARY EDUCATION, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: “Expanded Government Assistance to Students and Teacher in Private Education Act.” Increases the amount of financial assistance given to students-grantees through GASTPE so that it can be more responsive to the needs of the students and the schools as well; improves the voucher support system provided to secondary and tertiary students whose incomes are below the poverty line and can not be accommodated by public educational institution due to lack of facilities.

name: HBN-00089
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTIONALIZING THE PRESCHOOL EDUCATION INTO THE BASIC EDUCATION SYSTEM AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: ”Preschool Education Act.” Institutionalizes preschool education as part of basic education and be made mandatory for all five (5)-year old children.

name: HBN-00090
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTIONALIZING THE GRANT OF STUDENT FARE DISCOUNT PRIVILEGES ON LAND, WATER AND AIR TRANSPORT UTILITIES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Grants fare discount privilege to students even during Saturdays, Sundays, Christmas vacation and other holidays to enable and encourage them to undertake researches and group studies.

name: HBN-00091
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE CEBU ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT ZONE COVERING ALL THE CITIES AND MUNICIPALITIES IN THE ISLAND OF CEBU, CREATING FOR THE PURPOSE THE CEBU ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT ZONE AUTHORITY, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00092
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE CEBU LIGHT RAIL TRANSPORT SYSTEM FOR OPERATION IN CEBU CITY AND METRO CEBU AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00093
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO STRENGTHEN AND ENHANCE THE USE OF ENGLISH AS THE MEDIUM OF INSTRUCTION IN PHILIPPINE SCHOOLS
congress_website_abstract: “Strengthening and Enhancing the Use of English as the Medium of Instruction Act.” Aims to correct the defects of the current Bilingual Education Program of the Department of Education (DepEd) thus improving the learning process in school to ensure quality inputs in the educational program.

name: HBN-00094
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE REGIONALIZATION OF THE DEPARTMENT OF EDUCATION PAYROLL SERVICES DIVISION AND PROVIDING FOR FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: Decentralizes the Payroll Service Division of the Department of Education (DepEd) thereby establishing the Regional Payroll Service (Unit (RPSU) in every regional office of the Department including the Autonomous Region in Muslim Mindanao (ARMM) with the end in view of ensuring the release of salary checks of teachers and other personnel not later than three (3) days before the end onf the month for which such salaries are due.

name: HBN-00095
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING INCENTIVES TO ALL BARANGAY OFFICIALS, INCLUDING BARANGAY TANODS AND MEMBERS OF THE LUPONG TAGAPAMAYAPA, AND BARANGAY EMPLOYEES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Barangay Incentives Act of 2010.” Seeks to give due recognition to the important job being performed by the barangay official s and employees as well as to acknowledge the vital role being played by the smallest government unit and political subdivision, the barangay.

name: HBN-00096
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A NATIONAL POLICY ON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH, RESPONSIBLE PARENTHOOD AND POPULATION AND DEVELOPMENT, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “The Reproductive Health and Population and Development Act of 2010.” Seeks to provide the enabling environment for couples and individuals to enjoy the basic right to decide freely and responsibly the number and spacing of their children and to have the information, education and access to safe, effective, affordable and acceptable methods of family planning of their choice.

name: HBN-00097
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING COMPENSATION TO VICTIMS OF HUMAN RIGHTS VIOLATIONS DURING THE MARCOS REGIME, DOCUMENTATION OF SAID VIOLATIONS, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: ”Compensation Act to Victims of Human Rights Violations.” Provides compensation to the victims of human rights violations and/or their families for the death, injuries, sufferings, deprivations and damages they suffered during the period from September 21, 1972 to February 25, 1986, and the continuing harm they have endured as a result of past abuses, including the economic dislocation or deprivation resulting more particularly from the extrajudicial killing or enforced disappearance of the family breadwinner; aims to restore the victims´ honor and dignity and most importantly to recognize their heroism and martyrdom.

name: HBN-00098
title: ANTI-ENFORCED OR INVOLUNTARY DISAPPEARANCE ACT OF 2012
long_title: AN ACT DEFINING AND PENALIZING ENFORCED OR INVOLUNTARY DISAPPEARANCE AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_title: AN ACT DEFINING AND PENALIZING ENFORCED OR INVOLUNTARY DISAPPEARANCE AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Anti-Enforced or Involuntary Disappearance Act of 2010.” Adopts the 2006 International Convention for the Protection of All Persons from Enforced Disappearance´s definition of enforced disappearance which refers to the “arrest, detention, abduction, or any other form of deprivation of liberty by agents of the State or by persons or groups of persons acting with the authorization, support or acquiescence of the State, followed by a refusal to acknowledge the deprivation of liberty or by concealment of the fate or whereabouts of the disappeared person, which place such person outside the protection of the law” even as it seeks to impose penalties for its commission.

name: HBN-00099
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING THE RAMIREZ TELEPHONE CORPORATION A FRANCHISE TO CONSTRUCT, INSTALL, ESTABLISH, OPERATE AND MAINTAIN LOCAL EXCHANGE NETWORK IN THE PROVINCE OF ALBAY

name: HBN-00100
congress_website_title: AN ACT REGULATING THE EDUCATION AND LICENSURE OF PHYSICIANS AND THE PRACTICE OF MEDICINE IN THE PHILIPPINES, REPEALING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2382, AS AMENDED, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Physicians Act of 2010.” Provides for the following: a) the standardization, upgrading and regulation of medical courses including internship training; b) the examination for registration and licensure of physicians; c) the supervision, control and regulation of the practice of medicine; d) the integration of the medical profession; and, e) the development of the professional competence of physicians through a continuing professional education.

name: HBN-00101
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A NATIONAL POLICY ON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH AND POPULATION AND DEVELOPMENT, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “The Reproductive Health and Population and Development Act of 2010.” Recognizes the critical national reproductive health situation, the increasing demand of Filipino parents, couples, women, men and young adolescents themselves, as well as the policy gaps and the government´s responsibility to address the people´s reproductive health.

name: HBN-00102
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING ADDITIONAL POWERS TO THE PHILIPPINE HEALTH INSURANCE CORPORATION (PHILHEALTH), AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7875, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE 'NATIONAL HEALTH INSURANCE ACT OF 1995', AS AMENDED, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to strengthen the Philippine Health Insurance Corporation by authorizing it to go after criminals who seek to defraud the national health insurance funds through false claims by vesting it to: 1) have a visitorial power; 2) expedite resolution of grievances; 3) classify abuses and unethical practices; 4) increase the penalties to a maximum of P100,000.00 against erring health care providers; and, 5) give an inclusion of 60-day filing period within which hospitals must file their claims from date of discharge of their patients.

name: HBN-00103
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE WESTERN VISAYAS MEDICAL CENTER INTO A GOVERNMENT-OWNED AND -CONTROLLED HOSPITAL CORPORATION WITH THE SAN JOAQUIN MUNICIPAL HOSPITAL AS ITS SUBSIDIARY AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00104
congress_website_title: AN ACT FURTHER AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9164, RESETTING THE BARANGAY AND SANGGUNIANG KABATAAN ELECTIONS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Extends the terms of office of the barangay as well as the sangguniang kabataan officials ending on October 29, 2010 to November 30, 2012 and correspondingly postpone the barangay elections to the last Monday of October 2012.

name: HBN-00105
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 4 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9184, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE 'GOVERNMENT PROCUREMENT REFORM ACT'
congress_website_abstract: Removes any ambiguity in the interpretation of the scope and application of RA09184 by amending Section 4 thereof to make it very clear that it applies to all government procurement activities, regardless of source of funds, whether local or foreign, and that only treaties or international or executive agreements entered into by the government prior to its enactment shall be exempt from its coverage.

name: HBN-00106
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING THE PROVINCE OF CAVITE AS THE HISTORICAL CAPITAL OF THE PHILIPPINES

name: HBN-00107
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR MANDATORY HEPATITIS B VACCINATION OF ALL INFANTS WITHIN A REASONABLE PERIOD OF TIME AFTER BIRTH, AND OTHER VACCINE-PREVENTABLE DISEASE
congress_website_abstract: “Mandatory Infant-Health Immunization Act of 2010.” Adopts a comprehensive, mandatory and sustainable immunization program for the Heptitis B and other Vaccine-Preventable Diseases for all infants.

name: HBN-00108
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE PHILIPPINE LEGISLATIVE ACADEMY, DEFINING ITS POWERS AND FUNCTIONS, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Institutionalizes the guidelines needed to maintain a high level of technical and professional personnel in the Legislative Branch by establishing the Philippine Legislative Academy with the aim of providing a system of training and continuing education program for the legislative officers and employees.

name: HBN-00109
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING GOOD CONDUCT TIME ALLOWANCE TO PRISONERS WHO PARTICIPATE IN LITERACY, SKILLS AND VALUES DEVELOPMENT PROGRAMS IN PENAL INSTITUTIONS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE ARTICLE 97 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3815, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE REVISED PENAL CODE
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to give the inmates the opportunity to be educated, develop skills and strengthen their moral values while under detention.

name: HBN-00110
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE DIRECT REMITTANCE TO THE HOST LOCAL GOVERNMENT UNIT OF ITS FORTY PERCENT (40%) SHARE OF THE GROSS COLLECTION DERIVED BY THE NATIONAL GOVERNMENT FROM NATIONAL WEALTH TAXES, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 293 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991
congress_website_abstract: Requires any person, natural or juridical, engaged in the utilization and development of the national wealth to remit forty (40%) percent of the gross collection derived by the national government from the national wealth taxes directly to the host local government units (LGUs) and the remaining sixty (60%) to the national government thus allowing the LGU to directly receive its just share from the national government wealth.

name: HBN-00111
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING ALL GOVERNMENT-ISSUED IDENTIFICATION CARDS, CERTIFICATES AND LICENSES TO INCLUDE A PORTION INDICATING THE BLOOD TYPE OF THE HOLDER THEREOF AND PROVIDING PENALTIES FOR VIOLATION THEREOF
congress_website_abstract: “Blood Type Identification Act of 2010.” Requires all government-issued identification cards, certificates and licenses to include a portion indicating the blood type of the holder thereof in order to facilitate the immediate matching of the correct blood type of the holder, in case of emergency which results to excessive blood loss, to be transfused in order to save the life of the victim.

name: HBN-00112
congress_website_title: AN ACT STRENGTHENING THE LADDERIZED INTERFACE BETWEEN TECHNICAL-VOCATIONAL EDUCATION AND TRAINING (TVET) AND HIGHER EDUCATION
congress_website_abstract: \"Ladderized Education Act of 2009.\" Institutionalizes the ladderized education interface between technical vocational education and training (TVET) and higher education to open the pathways of opportunities for career and educational progression of students and workers, create a seamless and borderless education, empower students and workers to exercise options or to choose when to enter and exit from the educational ladder, and provide job platforms at every exit as well as opportunity to earn income.

name: HBN-00113
congress_website_title: THE PHILIPPINE IMMIGRATION ACT OF 2010
congress_website_abstract: “Philippine Immigration Act of 2010.” Creates the Commission on Immigration and Naturalization which shall principally responsible for the administration and enforcement of immigration, alien registration, citizenship and administrative naturalization laws.

name: HBN-00114
congress_website_title: AN ACT FURTHER STRENGTHENING THE ANTI-SMUGGLING MECHANISM, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE CERTAIN PROVISIONS OF PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 1464, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE TARIFF AND CUSTOMS CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES, AS AMENDED, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Anti-Smuggling Act of 2010.” Seeks to promote good governance, public accountability and transparency in the operations and workings of the Bureau of Customs and its personnel, strengthen policies that will eradicate or minimize all types of smuggling, improve the processes in the Bureau, and institute vital reforms to reinvigorate the trust of the public to the revenue-collecting government institution.

name: HBN-00115
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING CERTAIN SECTIONS OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SEVENTY-EIGHT THIRTY-TWO, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE 'ANTI-ELECTRICITY AND ELECTRIC TRANSMISSION LINES/MATERIALS PILFERAGE ACT OF 1994'
congress_website_abstract: Hopes to bring better benefits to the Filipino consumers as well as to protect the properties of the power industry players from pilferage activities and destruction by adding a new provision in RA07832 thus avoiding “executive or judicial legislation” in the interpretation of the law, especially on the issue of maximum cap for recoverable systems loss.

name: HBN-00116
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR STIFFER PENALTIES FOR CRIMES RELATING TO FIREARMS AND LIGHT WEAPONS, FURTHER AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 1866, AS AMENDED ENTITLED 'CODIFYING THE LAWS ON ILLEGAL/UNLAWFUL POSSESSION, MANUFACTURE, DEALING IN, ACQUISITION OR DISPOSITION OF FIREARMS, AMMUNITION OR EXPLOSIVES OR INSTRUMENTS USED IN THE MANUFACTURE OF FIREARMS, AMMUNITION OR EXPLOSIVES, AND IMPOSING STIFFER PENALTIES FOR CERTAIN VIOLATIONS THEREOF, AND FOR RELEVANT PURPOSES'
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to reduce if not totally eradicate loose firearms and to have a society of responsible gun holders who register their firearms and provide stiffer penalties for violation of unlawful possession, acquisition, manufacture, dealing in, acquisition or disposition of firearms, ammunition and legitimate weapons which will enable law enforcement agencies and prosecutors to implement the law and prosecute violators effectively.

name: HBN-00117
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING THE RIGHT OF REPLY AND PROVIDING PENALTIES FOR VIOLATION THEREOF
congress_website_abstract: Gives an accused or a criticized person the right of reply in all forms of mass media, websites or through any electronic devices.

name: HBN-00118
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO REQUIRE THE TEACHING OF BASIC COMPUTER PROGRAMMING AS PART OF THE CURRICULUM OF ALL SECONDARY SCHOOLS IN THE COUNTRY AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Mandates the inclusion of basic computer programming courses in the curriculum of all high schools in the country to make the youth computer literate.

name: HBN-00119
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING ALL PUBLIC UTILITY AGENCIES AND COMPANIES OR CORPORATIONS, BOTH PUBLIC AND PRIVATE, TO REPAIR ANY DIGGING OR DESTRUCTION MADE IN THE COURSE OF THEIR INSTALLATION OR MAINTENANCE WORK
congress_website_abstract: Requires the punong barangay to issue a certificate of repair work completion which shall be the basis for any future activities that any public utility company may venture into in the same barangay.

name: HBN-00120
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO ESTABLISH A NATIONAL JUNIOR POLICE AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Establishes a National Junior Police Force which shall be composed of abled Filipino citizens between the age of fifteen (15) and twenty (20) years old who will assists the regular policemen, local officials and even school officials in the enforcement of laws and ordinances.

name: HBN-00121
congress_website_title: AN ACT REVISING THE CHARTER OF THE CITY OF BAGUIO

name: HBN-00122
congress_website_title: AN ACT FURTHER AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9164, AS AMENDED BY REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9340, RESETTING THE BARANGAY AND SANGGUNIANG KABATAAN ELECTIONS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to postpone the holding of the barangay and sangguniang kabataan elections from October 2010 to October 2013.

name: HBN-00123
congress_website_title: AN ACT STRENGTHENING CONSUMER PROTECTION IN THE PURCHASE OF BRAND NEW MOTOR VEHICLES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Lemon Law of 2010.” seeks to protect consumers in the sale of motor vehicles against sales and trade practices which are defective, unfair and inimical to the interests of the consumers and public.

name: HBN-00124
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A STATE COLLEGE IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF COMPOSTELA, COMPOSTELA VALLEY PROVINCE TO BE KNOWN AS THE COMPOSTELA VALLEY STATE COLLEGE INTEGRATING THEREWITH AS REGULAR BRANCHES THE BUKIDNON STATE UNIVERSITY EXTERNAL STUDIES CENTERS IN THE MUNICIPALITIES OF MONKAYO, MARAGUSAN, MONTEVISTA AND NEW BATAAN, ALL MUNICIPALITIES LOCATED IN COMPOSTELA VALLEY PROVINCE, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00125
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE BED CAPACITY OF THE DAVAO REGIONAL HOSPITAL FROM TWO HUNDRED (200) TO FOUR HUNDRED (400) BEDS AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00166
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7610, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE \"SPECIAL PROTECTION OF CHILDREN AGAINST CHILD ABUSE, EXPLOITATION AND DISCRIMINATION ACT\" BY PENALIZING ANY ACT THAT PREVENTS THE CHILD TO LEARN AND USE THE LANGUAGE OF HIS FAMILY IN HIS BASIC EDUCATION, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Provides special protection to children from all forms of abuses, neglect cruelty, exploitation and discrimination, and other conditions prejudicial to their development by imposing penalties to persons who prevent the children to learn and use the language of their families.

name: HBN-00167
congress_website_title: AN ACT DEFINING CYBERCRIME, PROVIDING FOR PREVENTION, SUPPRESSION AND IMPOSITION OF PENALTIES THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Cybercrime Prevention Act of 2010.” Seeks to prevent computer fraud, abuse and other cyber-related fraudulent activities by penalizing those who violate this specific anti-cyber law.

name: HBN-00168
congress_website_title: AN ACT FURTHER AMENDING PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 198, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS \"THE PROVINCIAL WATER UTILITIES ACT OF 1973\"
congress_website_abstract: Increases the authorized capitalization of the Local Water Utilities Administration (LWUA) from Php2.5 Billion to PhP25 Billion to enable it to pursue its mandate under the present times.

name: HBN-00169
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE ILOCOS SUR UPLAND DEVELOPMENT AUTHORITY, DEFINING ITS POWERS AND FUNCTIONS, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00170
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING TOBACCO MANUFACTURERS TO USE A MINIMUM OF SEVENTY FIVE PERCENT (75%) LOCALLY PRODUCED TOBACCO IN THE MANUFACTURE OF CIGARETTES IN THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to require tobacco manufacturers to use at least seventy-five (75%) per cent locally grown tobacco in the manufacture of cigarettes in the country to enable the local tobacco farmers to send their children to school and improve their standard of living.

name: HBN-00171
congress_website_title: AN ACT FURTHER STRENGTHENING THE ANTI-SMUGGLING MECHANISM, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE CERTAIN PROVISIONS OF PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 1464, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE TARIFF AND CUSTOMS CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES, AS AMENDED, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to reinforce the anti-smuggling effort of the government by drastically upgrading the penalties that can be impose against those involved in the unlawful importation and other intrinsic acts that abet smuggling.

name: HBN-00172
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A FRAMEWORK OF GOVERNANCE AND DEVELOPMENT FOR THE PHILIPPINE EDUCATION SYSTEM, INTEGRATING THE PRESENT DEPARTMENT OF EDUCATION (DEPED), THE COMMISSION ON HIGHER EDUCATION, AND THE TECHNICAL EDUCATION AND SKILLS DEVELOPMENT AUTHORITY (TESDA) INTO ONE AGENCY TO BE CALLED THE DEPARTMENT OF EDUCATION AND TRAINING (DET), APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Philippine Education Integration Act of 2010.” Seeks to provide a comprehensive framework for the governance and development of the Philippine education system by creating an integrated administration of the entire system thus creating a synergy that steers its development, excellence and nationalism.

name: HBN-00173
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6734 ENTITLED \"AN ACT PROVIDING FOR AN ORGANIC ACT FOR THE AUTONOMOUS REGION IN MUSLIM MINDANAO\" AS AMENDED BY REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9054, PROVIDING FOR THE CREATION OF THE AUTONOMOUS REGION IN SOUTHWESTERN MINDANAO AND THE AUTONOMOUS REGION IN CENTRAL MINDANAO

name: HBN-00174
congress_website_title: AN ACT BANNING THE CATCHING, SALE, PURCHASE, POSSESSION, TRANSPORTATION AND EXPORTATION OF ALL SHARKS AND RAYS IN THE COUNTRY AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Sharks and Rays Conservation Act of 2010.” Seeks to conserve, protect and sustain the management of the country´s sharks and rays population and habitats to promote ecological balance and maintain marine biodiversity.

name: HBN-00175
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING AND MAINTAINING LACTATION STATIONS IN WORKPLACES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Institutionalizes the employee lactation support program in the country by establishing lactation stations in workplaces thus giving the nursing working mothers ample breaks and the privacy to express breast milk for their infants.

name: HBN-00176
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTIONS 91 AND 97 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8550, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE PHILIPPINE FISHERIES CODE OF 1998
congress_website_abstract: Prohibits the fishing, catching, gathering, sale, purchase, possession, transport and exportation of rare, threatened or endangered species listed and defined in the Convention on the International Trade in Endangered Species of Flora and Fauna (CITIES), the International Union for Conservation of Nature and Natural Resources (IUCN) and RA09147.

name: HBN-00177
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE NORTHERN ILOILO STATE UNIVERSITY IN THE PROVINCE OF ILOILO, BY INTEGRATING THE NORTHERN ILOILO POLYTECHNIC COLLEGE (NIPSC) IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ESTANCIA, THE NIPSC-BAROTAC VIEJO CAMPUS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BAROTAC VIEJO, THE AJUY POLYTECHNIC COLLEGE IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF AJUY, THE BATAD POLYTECHNIC COLLEGE IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BATAD, THE CONCEPCION POLYTECHNIC COLLEGE IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CONCEPCION, THE LEMERY POLYTECHNIC COLLEGE IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LEMERY, AND THE VICTORINO SALCEDO POLYTECHNIC COLLEGE IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SARA, ALL MUNICIPALITIES LOCATED IN THE PROVINCE OF ILOILO, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00178
congress_website_title: AN ACT DEFINING THE AUTHORITY OF THE OFFICE OF THE OMBUDSMAN OVER ELECTIVE AND APPOINTIVE OFFICIALS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6770 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS \"THE OMBUDSMAN ACT OF 1989\"
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to clearly define the powers of the Ombudsman over public officials, especially local elective public officials, in conjunction with the Philippine Constitution and other relevant laws.

name: HBN-00179
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE MUNICIPALITY OF CULASI IN THE PROVINCE OF ILOILO AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00180
congress_website_title: AN ACT EXEMPTING POOR LITIGANTS FROM POSTING BAIL WHEN CHARGED WITH NON-CAPITAL OFFENSES FOR THE FIRST TIME AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Poor Litigants Equalization Act of 2010.” Seeks to exempt poor litigants from posting bail when charged with felony or crime in which the law attaches imprisonment of not more than six years for the first time and be released on cognizance.

name: HBN-00181
congress_website_title: AN ACT EXEMPTING ANY PERSON WHO SELLS ANY REAL PROPERTY TO THE GOVERNMENT OR ANY OF ITS POLITICAL SUBDIVISIONS OR INSTRUMENTALITIES FROM THE PAYMENT OF CAPITAL GAINS TAX AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to encourage private owners to sell their real properties to the government or any of its political subdivisions or instrumentalities by exempting them from the payment of capital gains tax.

name: HBN-00182
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING TWO (2) ADDITIONAL REGIONAL TRIAL COURT BRANCHES AND TWO (2) ADDITIONAL MUNICIPAL TRIAL COURT BRANCHES FOR SAN JOSE CITY, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE BATAS PAMBANSA BLG. 129, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE \"JUDICIARY REORGANIZATION ACT OF 1980\" AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00183
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING TWO (2) ADDITIONAL REGIONAL TRIAL COURTS IN THE PROVINCE OF NUEVA ECIJA WITH SEATS AT THE SCIENCE CITY OF MUÑOZ AND THE MUNICIPALITY OF RIZAL, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE PARAGRAPH (C), SECTION 14 OF BATAS PAMBANSA BLG. 129, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE JUDICIARY REORGANIZATION ACT OF 1980

name: HBN-00184
title: MUNOZ - TALUGTUG PROVINCIAL ROAD (PROVINCE OF NUEVA ECIJA)
long_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE MUNOZ - TALUGTUG PROVINCIAL ROAD IN THE PROVINCE OF NUEVA ECIJA, GOING TO UMINGAN, PANGASINAN VIA BARANGAYS GABALDON - SAVERONA - PATOLA IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TALUGTUG, NUEVA ECIJA, INTO A NATIONAL ROAD AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE MUÑOZ-TALUGTUG PROVINCIAL ROAD IN THE PROVINCE OF NUEVA ECIJA, GOING TO UMINGAN, PANGASINAN, VIA BARANGAYS GABALDON-SAVERONA-PATOLA IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TALUGTUG, INTO A NATIONAL ROAD AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00185
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 16 OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBER 7586 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE NATIONAL INTEGRATED PROTECTED AREAS SYSTEM ACT OF 1992
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to overhaul the system of how funds are utilized and administered for the development and management of each protected area in the country.

name: HBN-00206
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO REGULATE THE RATIONAL EXPLORATION, DEVELOPMENT AND UTILIZATION OF MINERAL RESOURCES, AND TO ENSURE THE EQUITABLE SHARING OF BENEFITS FOR THE STATE, INDIGENOUS PEOPLES AND LOCAL COMMUNITIES, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Philippine Mineral Resources Act of 2010.” Aims to govern the ownership, management and governance of ore minerals onshore, as well as quarry resources, sand and gravel, guano, and gemstones, and the conservation, exploration, development, utilization, processing and transportation thereof.

name: HBN-00207
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 4 (PARAGRAPH 58) AND PROVIDING AN ADDITIONAL SECTION ON MUNICIPAL FISHERIES, CHAPTER 2, ARTICLE I OF R.A. 8550, ENTITLED: \"AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE DEVELOPMENT, MANAGEMENT AND CONSERVATION OF THE FISHERIES AND AQUATIC RESOURCES, INTEGRATING ALL LAWS PERTINENT THERETO, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to rectify the inappropriateness of the current definition by adopting archipelagic principle in the definition of municipal waters and providing additional section on Municipal Fisheries of the same code.

name: HBN-00208
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING CHAPTER VI, PROHIBITIONS AND PENALTIES AND PROVIDING AN ADDITIONAL CHAPTER ON LEGAL ACTIONS TO R.A. 8550, ENTITLED: \"AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE DEVELOPMENT, MANAGEMENT AND CONSERVATION OF THE FISHERIES AND AQUATIC RESOURCES, INTEGRATING ALL LAWS PERTINENT THERETO, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES\"
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to strengthen the law to curb if not totally eliminate the illegal activities of the commercial fishers in municipal waters and to institutionalize the right of every citizen to file suit and receive remunerations for violations to their person and to the provision of this act.

name: HBN-00209
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 4 (PARAGRAPH 40) AND PROVIDING ADDITIONAL SECTION ON MUNICIPAL FISHERIES, CHAPTER 2, ARTICLE I OF R.A. 8550, ENTITLED: \"AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE DEVELOPMENT, MANAGEMENT AND CONSERVATION OF THE FISHERIES AND AQUATIC RESOURCES, INTEGRATING ALL LAWS PERTINENT THERETO, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to modify the definition of fishing gears as being classified `passive´ and `active´ into `allowed´ and `not allowed´ to provide more latitude in deciding which gears belong to each category.

name: HBN-00210
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING COMPULSORY COVERAGE TO ACCREDITED BARANGAY HEALTH WORKERS IN THE NATIONAL HEALTH INSURANCE PROGRAM, AMENDING FOR THIS PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT 7883, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Covers compulsorily all barangay health workers and their dependents to be enrolled in the national health insurance program for them to receive and avail of an adequate package of personal health services which shall include in-patient hospital care, out-patient care, emergency and transfer services and other supplementary health benefits as may be defined by the Philippine Health Insurance Corporation (PHIC) and the local government units (LGUs) where they render services.

name: HBN-00211
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A COMPREHENSIVE HAZARDOUS AND RADIOACTIVE WASTES MANAGEMENT, PROVIDING PENALTIES FOR VIOLATIONS THEREOF, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
