congress_website_abstract: “Philippine Hazardous and Radioactive Wastes Management Act of 2010.” Seeks to develop and implement national and local integrated and comprehensive hazardous and radioactive wastes management programs focusing on pollution prevention and resource conservation recovery, which shall: 1) improve wastes management techniques, organizational arrangements, methods of collection, separation and recovery of wastes; 2) promote environmentally safe disposal of residues; 3) minimize the generation of hazardous and radioactive wastes by encouraging cleaner production, process substitution, resource recovery, recycling and reuse, and treatment, and 4) institutionalize public participation in the development and implementation of such programs.

name: HBN-00212
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTING REFORMS IN THE REAL PROPERTY VALUATION AND ASSESSMENT PRACTICES IN THE PHILIPPINES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Real Property Valuation Reform Act of 2010.” Seeks to promote the development and maintenance of a just, equitable, impartial and nationally consistent real property valuation system, based on internationally accepted valuation standards, concepts, principles and practices.

name: HBN-00213
congress_website_title: AN ACT GOVERNING THE CREATION AND ACCREDITATION OF MICRO-ENTERPRISE DEVELOPMENT INSTITUTIONS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Micro-Enterprise Development Institution Act of 2010.” Seeks to pursue a more focused program of poverty eradication wherein every poor Filipino family shall be empowered to meet its minimum basic needs, including income security, by according them with more access to micro-finance, micro-insurance, health care, micro-housing, business development such as leadership training and entrepreneurial skills training and human development services.

name: HBN-00214
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO INCLUDE PETITIONS TO CORRECT CLERICAL ERROR IN THE ENTRY FOR AGE OR GENDER OF A PERSON IN HIS CIVIL REGISTRY RECORDS TO BE FILED WITH THE LOCAL CIVIL REGISTRY OFFICE OR OFFICE OF THE CONSUL, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT 9048 OR THE CLERICAL ERROR LAW
congress_website_abstract: Amends RA09048 by defining clerical or typographical error as a “mistake committed in the performance of clerical work in writing, copying, transcribing or typing an entry in the civil register that is harmless and innocuous, such as misspelled name or misspelled date of birth or the like, which is visible to the eyes or obvious to the understanding and can be corrected or changed only by reference to other existing record or records: Provided, however, that no correction must involve the change of nationality xx x or status of the petitioner.”

name: HBN-00215
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO AMEND PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NINE HUNDRED FIFTY SEVEN (PD 957) TO INCREASE THE PENALTIES FOR VIOLATION THEREOF
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to impose penalties for violation of PD 957 otherwise known as the law regulating the sale of subdivision lots and condominiums, to wit: a) on the first offense, a fine of not more that P500,000.00 or 100% of the total purchase price of the properties sold whichever is higher and/or imprisonment of not more than 4 years, at the discretion of the court; b) on the second offense, a fine of not more that P700,000.00 or 100% of the total purchase price of the properties sold whichever is higher and/or imprisonment of not more than 7 years, at the discretion of the court; c) on the third offense, a fine of not more that P1,000,000.00 or 100% of the total purchase price of the properties sold whichever is higher and/or imprisonment of not more than 10 years, at the discretion of the court, the business permit shall be revoked or canceled.

name: HBN-00216
congress_website_title: AN ACT REGULATING THE IMPOSITION OF SERVICE CHARGE BY HOTELS, RESTAURANTS AND OTHER SIMILAR ESTABLISHMENTS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Service Charge Regulation Act of 2010.” Requires food and beverage outlets to conspicuously display signs that they are to impose service charges, and under what circumstances can service charges be imposed and at what amount.

name: HBN-00217
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE \"SENTRO NG BATAS SA WIKA\", DEFINING ITS FUNCTIONS AND PROVIDING FOR ITS FINANCING, ADMINISTRATION AND OPERATION, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: “Sentro ng Batas sa Wika.” Aims to produce scholarly legal materials in Filipino, the translation of laws, rules and regulations and jurisprudence of the Supreme Court in Filipino, the use of Filipino in courts of justice as official communication to ensure speedy trials and transparency in the administration of justice.

name: HBN-00218
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROHIBITING THE STORAGE, DISTRIBUTION AND USE OF ARTIFICIAL TRANS FAT IN THE PREPARATION OF FOOD BY FOOD SERVICE FACILITIES OR FOOD SERVICE ESTABLISHMENTS AND MANUFACTURERS AND TO MANDATE THE FOOD SERVICE FACILITIES OR FOOD SERVICE ESTABLISHMENTS TO MAINTAIN ON SITE THE ORIGINAL LABELS FOR ALL FOOD PRODUCTS OR DOCUMENTS INSTEAD OF LABEL AND THE SUBMISSION OF DOCUMENT FOR FOODS THAT ARE NOT LABELED
congress_website_abstract: “Trans Fat Prohibition Act of 2010.” Institutionalizes the effort to prevent the populace the high risk of acquiring heart-related diseases by banning the use of trans fat acids in all manufactured foods and preparation of food sold in food establishments.

name: HBN-00219
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTIONALIZING THE PARTICIPATION OF BONA FIDE PEOPLE'S ORGANIZATIONS, NON-GOVERNMENT ORGANIZATIONS, OR PRIVATE/CIVIC SECTOR GROUPS IN PUBLIC HEARINGS IN CONGRESS AND LOCAL GOVERNMENT UNITS' BUDGET DELIBERATIONS
congress_website_abstract: “People´s Participation in Budget Deliberation Act of 2010.” Aims to institutionalize people´s participation in budget deliberations in various levels of government - national, provincial, municipal down to the barangay level, without underestimating and undermining the capabilities of elected representatives in crafting a budget that is most needed by a particular locality, giving full play to the people´s right to participate in at all levels of social, political and economic decision-making.

name: HBN-00220
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROHIBITING AN ELECTIVE PUBLIC OFFICIAL FROM RESIGNING HIS ELECTIVE OFFICE TO ACCEPT AN APPOINTMENT TO ANY GOVERNMENT OFFICE AND PROVIDING PENALTIES THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to preserve the integrity of the covenant between the electorate and the elective official for the latter to serve the term for which he was elected by declaring it unlawful to accept an appointive position in government thereby discouraging this pernicious practice of resigning before the term expires.

name: HBN-00221
congress_website_title: AN ACT MAKING AUTOMATED TELLER MACHINES ACCESSIBLE TO THE VISUALLY IMPAIRED
congress_website_abstract: “ATM Access for the Visually Impaired Act” Requires all banking institutions to provide the visually impaired with access to their Automated Teller Machine (ATM) by installing Audio Transmission System for the easy facility of the visually impaired to financially transact with an ATM.

name: HBN-00222
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING SEPTEMBER 19 OF EVERY YEAR AS LEAN ALEJANDRO DAY IN HONOR OF THE MARTYRDOM OF YOUTH LEADER LEANDRO L. ALEJANDRO

name: HBN-00223
congress_website_title: AN ACT DEFINING AND PENALIZING THE CRIME OF ENFORCED OR INVOLUNTARY DISAPPEARANCE AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Anti-Enforced or Involuntary Disappearance Act of 2010” Enumerates the following salient features of the bill: 1) continuing character of enforced disappearance as long as the whereabouts of the disappeared person have not been determined with certainty; 2) non-derogability of the right against enforced disappearance and the enforcement of safeguards for its prevention under all circumstances including political instability, threat of war, state of war or any other public emergency; 3) expeditious disposition of habeas corpus, amparo, and habeas data proceedings and immediate compliance with any release order by virtue of such proceedings; and 4) liability of commanding officers/superiors or equivalent senior officials of the offender for failure to prevent, discontinue or uncover an enforced disappearance.

name: HBN-00224
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE PHILIPPINE THOROUGHBRED HORSERACING AUTHORITY PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Charter of the Philippine Thoroughbred Horseracing Authority” Seeks to abolish the existing Philippine Racing Authority repealing Presidential Decree No. 42, thereby promoting and strengthening the thoroughbred horseracing industry by ensuring the professional development of the horseracing personnel, upgrading the breed of the Philippine Thoroughbred horses and ensuring the efficient and fair operation of horseracing through regulatory measures.

name: HBN-00225
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE CAREER EXECUTIVE SYSTEM
congress_website_abstract: “Career Executive System Act of 2010” Establishes a system for the professionalization and career development of the executive and managerial component in the third level of the civil service.

name: HBN-00146
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING A SPECIAL ECONOMIC ZONE IN THE PROVINCE OF TAWI-TAWI, CREATING FOR THE PURPOSE THE TAWI-TAWI SPECIAL ECONOMIC ZONE AUTHORITY, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00147
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE SOUTHWESTERN POLYTECHNIC UNIVERSITY (SWPU), INTEGRATING THERETO THE TAWI-TAWI COLLEGE OF TECHNOLOGY AND OCEANOGRAPHY, TAWI-TAWI REGIONAL AGRICULTURAL COLLEGE, THE TAWI-TAWI SCHOOL OF ARTS AND TRADE, AND THE TAWI-TAWI PILOT OPPORTUNITIES SCHOOL OF FISHERIES REPEALING FOR THE PURPOSE BATAS PAMBANSA BILANG 384 AND REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6060, AS AMENDED ON AUGUST 4, 1969 AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00148
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A MAGNA CARTA OF THE POOR
congress_website_abstract: “Magna Carta for the Poor.” Empowers the poor Filipino families towards the alleviation of their status through the implementation of anti-poverty programs, making government services accessible, strengthening government intervention, and enhancing the participation of non-government organizations (NGOs) and people´s organizations (POs); aims to guarantee the rights of the poor to food, employment and livelihood, quality education, shelter, basic health service and medicines.

name: HBN-00149
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE INTERNAL REVENUE ALLOTMENT OF LOCAL GOVERNMENT UNITS (LGUs) AND AUTHORIZING ITS AUTOMATIC RETENTION, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 284 AND 286 OF R.A. No. 7160 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991
congress_website_abstract: Increases the Internal Revenue Allotment (IRA) from forty (40%) per cent to sixty (60%) per cent to stimulate economic and social progress in the countryside.

name: HBN-00150
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING COMPULSORY COVERAGE TO ACCREDITED BARANGAY HEALTH WORKERS IN THE NATIONAL HEALTH INSURANCE PROGRAM, AMENDING FOR THIS PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7883, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Provides for the compulsory coverage of all the barangay health workers and their dependents to the national health insurance program of the government that entitles them to receive and avail of an adequate package of personal health services that include in-patient hospital care, out-patient care, emergency transfer services and also other supplementary health benefits.

name: HBN-00151
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO ESTABLISH THE MAGNA CARTA FOR BARANGAYS
congress_website_abstract: “The Magna Carta for Barangays.” Seeks to provide the following, among others: a) for the entitlement of barangay officials to be considered as regular government employees; b) for the construction of infrastructures, such as public schools, health centers and barangay halls in every barangay; c) improvement of funds transfer from provincial/municipal unit to the barangay for the construction and maintenance of roads and bridges; d) provision of better public transportation system in every barangay; e) enact the automatic release of barangays´ share from the national taxes as well as mandatory share of barangays in revenue, fees and other charges; and f) increasing employment opportunities by giving priority employment for barangay units and its residents.

name: HBN-00152
congress_website_title: AN ACT UPGRADING THE BENEFITS AND INCENTIVES OF BARANGAY TANOD BRIGADES, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SEC. 393 (d) OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991
congress_website_abstract: Bestows upon the barangay tanods additional benefits that will supplement their meager salaries and provide them with the necessary assistance such as free legal assistance from government for cases filed against them in the performance of their duties, and fifty (50%) per cent discounts on tuition fees and matriculation fees of both, their legitimate and legally adopted children.

name: HBN-00153
congress_website_title: AN ACT STRENGTHENING THE \"STUDY NOW PAY LATER PLAN\" FOR POST-SECONDARY EDUCATION AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Reformed `Study Now Pay Later Plan´ Act of 2010.” Envisions to localize the approach of the Study Now Pay Later Program, through the Local Government Units (LGUs), so that students from anywhere in the country can avail of this program by simply applying in their respective LGU office.

name: HBN-00154
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING A LOCAL HOUSING BOARD IN EVERY CITY AND MUNICIPALITY, PROVIDING FOR ITS POWERS AND DEFINING ITS DUTIES AND FUNCTIONS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Local Housing Board Act.” Creates a Local Housing Board in every city and 1st to 3rd class municipality for the purpose of formulating, implementing and monitoring policies on the provision of housing and on the observance of a just and humane procedure in case of eviction and or demolition in the local level.

name: HBN-00155
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING TAX CREDITS TO ASSIST THE PRIVATE SECTOR IN ESTABLISHING NATIONWIDE PREGNANCY CARE CENTERS THAT WILL PROVIDE COUNSELLING, CARE AND INFORMATION RELATED TO ALTERNATIVES TO ABORTION AND ARTIFICIAL CONTRACEPTION
congress_website_abstract: “The Pregnancy Care Centers Act of 2010.” Grants tax credits and rebates to agencies or organizations in the private sector that set up a pregnancy health care center which will provide pregnancy testing, pregnancy confirmation through ultra sound, mentoring and nurturing support, linkage to community resources, education, material aid, housing referrals, abstinence education for unmarried persons, and natural family planning methods for those married couples who are considering a postponement of their first of additional children.

name: HBN-00156
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROHIBITING DISCRIMINATION AGAINST A PERSON BY REASON OF AGE UPON HIRING FOR AND DURING EMPLOYMENT, PENALIZING ANY VIOLATION THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Anti-Age Discrimination in Employment Act of 2010.” Seeks to prohibit discrimination against any individual with respect to compensation and terms and conditions of employment on account of age.

name: HBN-00157
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO ESTABLISH THE MAGNA CARTA FOR BARANGAYS
congress_website_abstract: “The Magna Carta for Barangays.” Establishes the Magna Carta for Barangays which is aimed to promote, develop and improve the general welfare of the barangay residents, raise the economic and social status of barangay officials, grant every barangay, the basic facilities for decent, healthy and comfortable living therein.

name: HBN-00158
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROMOTING AGRICULTURAL AND MARINE PRODUCTION AND POST-HARVEST MECHANIZATION BY EXEMPTING FROM PAYMENT OF THE EXPANDED VALUE ADDED TAX THE IMPORTATION OF AGRICULTURAL AND FISHERIES MACHINERIES, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 109 OF THE NATIONAL INTERNAL REVENUE CODE, AS AMENDED, AND SECTION 109 OF THE AGRICULTURAL AND FISHERIES MODERNIZATION ACT OF 1997, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Mechanized Agriculture and Marine Promotion Act of 2010.” Seeks to exempt from payment of the expanded value added tax (EVAT) and other taxes and duties, the importation of agricultural and marine machineries, by amending Section 109 of RA09337 or the Value Added Tax Reform Act.

name: HBN-00159
congress_website_title: AN ACT IMPOSING A LIMIT ON ELECTION CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 95 OF BATAS PAMBANSA BLG 881, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE OMNIBUS ELECTION CODE, AND FOR OTHER PORPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Election Campaign Contribution Limit Act of 2010.” Seeks to limit and rationalize the contribution a single individual can give to a partisan political activity and the amount a candidate can spend for his electoral campaign.

name: HBN-00160
congress_website_title: AN ACT STRENGTHENING AND REDEFINING THE POWERS AND FUNCTIONS OF THE NATIONAL FOOD AUTHORITY, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NOS. 4 AND 1770, AS AMENDED, RESPECTIVELY KNOWN AS THE NATIONAL GRAINS AUTHORITY ACT AND THE NATIONAL FOOD AUTHORITY ACT, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “National Food Authority Act of 2010.” Seeks to financially strengthen the National Food Authority by wiping clean its books and transferring its loans and non-core assets to the National Government; inject fresh new capitalization; provide for a more transparent funding mechanism, and; streamline its organization by redefining the tasks of its individual units.

name: HBN-00161
congress_website_title: AN ACT LIBERALIZING THE EXPORT OF RICE, CORN AND OTHER GRAINS OR RELATED AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 6 (a) xii OF PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 4 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE NATIONAL GRAINS AUTHORITY ACT, AS AMENDED, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Grains Export Liberalization At of 2010.” Seeks to provide the farmers and agricultural workers better opportunity, encourage the increase in their productivity and improve their profitability, by allowing greater latitude in the export of their grains produce.

name: HBN-00162
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A MULTI-LINGUAL EDUCATION AND LITERACY PROGRAM, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “The Multi-Lingual Education and Literacy Act of 2010.” Aims to upgrade the literacy program of the government by making the native tongue as the medium of instruction (MOI) for the formative years of basic education.

name: HBN-00163
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING SIX (6) ADDITIONAL BRANCHES OF THE METROPOLITAN TRIAL COURT AND TWO (2) ADDITIONAL BRANCHES OF THE REGIONAL TRIAL COURT IN VALENZUELA CITY, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE BATAS PAMBANSA BILANG 129 OR THE JUDICIARY REORGANIZATION ACT OF 1980, AS AMENDED

name: HBN-00164
title: PHILIPPINE STANDARD TIME (PST) ACT OF 2011
long_title: AN ACT TO SET THE PHILIPPINE STANDARD TIME (PST) IN ALL OFFICIAL SOURCES THROUGHOUT THE COUNTRY, TO PROVIDE FUNDS FOR THE INSTALLATION, OPERATION AND MAINTENANCE OF SYNCHRONIZED TIME DEVICES TO BE DISPLAYED IN KEY PUBLIC PLACES, AND TO DECLARE THE FIRST WEEK OF EVERY YEAR AS NATIONAL TIME CONSCIOUSNESS WEEK
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO SET THE PHILIPPINE STANDARD TIME (PST) IN ALL OFFICIAL SOURCES THROUGHOUT THE COUNTRY AND TO PROVIDE FUNDS FOR THE INSTALLATION, OPERATION AND MAINTENANCE OF SYNCHRONIZED TIME DEVICES TO BE DISPLAYED IN KEY PUBLIC PLACES AND TO DECLARE THE FIRST WEEK OF EVERY YEAR AS NATIONAL TIME CONSCIOUSNESS WEEK
congress_website_abstract: “The Philippine Standard Time (PST) Act of 2010.” Sets the Philippine Standard Time (PST) in all official sources throughout the country by providing funds for the installation, operation and maintenance of synchronized time devices that are to be displayed in the key public places.

name: HBN-00165
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING ARTICLE 287 OF PRESIDENTIAL DECREE 442, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LABOR CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES BY ADDING A NEW ARTICLE 287-A REDUCING THE RETIREMENT AGE OF RACEHORSE JOCKEYS FROM SIXTY (60) TO FIFTY-FIVE (55)
congress_website_abstract: \"The Race Horse Jockeys Retirement Act of 2008.\" Lowers the retirement age of race horse jockeys from 60 to 55 years old so that they will have more time to enjoy the fruits of their labor and have more opportunities to practice other horse-racing professions such as horse trainers, or even train jockeys immediately after their retirement.

name: HBN-00186
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE OFFICE OF THE PHILIPPINE TRADE REPRESENTATIVE APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFORE AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Charter of the Office of the Philippine Trade Representative.” Seeks s to create a specialized and dedicated agency and officers that will formulate domestic and national priorities, come up with final trade positions, be responsible for all trade negotiations as well as coordinate with other branches of government in order to come up with a whole, cohesive, cross-industry trade strategy in accordance with the country´s development goals, and to authoritatively represent the country in all agreements it wish to enter.

name: HBN-00187
title: BAYAWAN CITY LTO DISTRICT OFFICE
long_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE BAYAWAN CITY LAND TRANSPORTATION OFFICE (LTO) EXTENSION OFFICE INTO A REGULAR LTO DISTRICT OFFICE
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE BAYAWAN CITY LAND TRANSPORTATION OFFICE (LTO) EXTENSION OFFICE INTO A REGULAR LTO DISTRICT OFFICE

name: HBN-00188
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING POBLACION PROVINCIAL ROAD IN BARANGAY MANTIQUIL NEGROS ORIENTAL INTO A NATIONAL ROAD

name: HBN-00189
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A FRONTLINE OFFICE OF THE DEPARTMENT OF FOREIGN AFFAIRS (DFA) IN DUMAGUETE CITY, PROVINCE OF ORIENTAL NEGROS, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREOF

name: HBN-00190
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE SALARY GRADE OF PUBLIC SCHOOL TEACHERS FROM SALARY GRADE 11 TO 20 AND PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: Upgrades the salary of public school teachers which shall be differentiated in accordance with the qualifications and length of service they have rendered and shall not be prejudiced by across the board adjustments.

name: HBN-00191
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO STRENGTHEN AND ENHANCE THE USE OF ENGLISH AS THE MEDIUM OF INSTRUCTION IN PHILIPPINE SCHOOLS
congress_website_abstract: “Strengthening and Enhancing the Use of English as the Medium of Instruction Act.” Provides for the use of English as the medium of instruction in pre-schools, elementary and high school and prescribes the teaching in specialized English in tertiary levels of the present educational system.

name: HBN-00192
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE CONSTRUCTION OF AN UNDERSEA TUNNEL FROM CEBU CITY TO THE MUNICIPALITY OF CORDOVA - AND A COASTAL ROAD TO LAPU LAPU CITY, PROVINCE OF CEBU, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00193
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR AN APPROPRIATE MODERN MASS TRANSPORT SYSTEM IN THE FIRST CONGRESSIONAL DISTRICT OF THE CITY OF CEBU, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00194
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING CERTAIN PROVISIONS OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7621 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS \"AN ACT CREATING THE CEBU PORT AUTHORITY DEFINING ITS POWERS AND FUNCTIONS, PROVIDING APPROPRIATION THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES\"

name: HBN-00195
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO ACCELERATE THE DEVELOPMENT OF INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY STARTUP COMPANIES BY PROVIDING AN IT VENTURE CAPITAL FUND AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “IT Venture Capital Fund of 2010.” Seeks to strengthen the global competitiveness of the country as well as maximize the unlimited potential of capable Filipinos to develop breakthrough products in the information Technology (IT) field that can become multi-million or even multi-billion dollar bestsellers.

name: HBN-00196
congress_website_title: AN ACT REPEALING THE PROVISIONS ON SEDITION UNDER ARTICLE 139, 140, 141 AND ARTICLE 142 OF ACT NO. 3815, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE REVISED PENAL CODE
congress_website_abstract: Repeals the provisions on sedition in the Revised Penal Code of the Philippines to make it consistent with the explicit mandate under the present Constitution and existing legislation on press freedom, freedom of expression, legitimate criticism of official conduct and the right of the people to peaceably assemble to petition the government for redress of their grievance.

name: HBN-00197
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE MODERNIZATION OF THE BUREAU OF CORRECTIONS (BuCor) PROVIDING THE FUNDS THEREOF AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Bureau of Corrections (BuCor) Modernization Act of 2010” Aims to ease the inhuman conditions of confinement and degrading treatment of prisoners brought about by crowded, decrepit, or dilapidated buildings and penitentiary facilities in the country.

name: HBN-00198
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE NATIONAL SEAFARERS ADMINISTRATION, PRESCRIBING ITS POWERS AND FUNCTIONS, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: “National Seafarers Administration Act of 2010.” Seeks to formulate policies and programs for the protection and promotion of rights and welfare of seamen assigned aboard foreign vessel.

name: HBN-00199
congress_website_title: AN ACT DEFINING THE RIGHTS OF VICTIMS OF CRIME, ESTABLISHING THE OFFICE OF VICTIMS OF CRIME UNDER THE DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Victims of Crime Act f 2010.” Seeks to define the rights of the victim, establish an Office of Victims of Crime, create a crime victims fund administered to all populations affected by victimization, including undeserved populations, such as sexually exploited children and victims residing on tribal lands in order to compensate and assist victims of crime.

name: HBN-00200
congress_website_title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE CAMARINES SUR POLYTECHNIC COLLEGE - NAGA CITY CAMPUS (FORMERLY BICOL COLLEGE OF ARTS AND TRADE) IN THE CITY OF NAGA, PROVINCE OF CAMARINES SUR FROM THE CAMARINES SUR POLYTECHNIC COLLEGE IN NABUA, CAMARINES SUR, CONVERTING IT INTO A STATE COLLEGE TO BE KNOWN AS THE BICOL STATE COLLEGE OF APPLIED SCIENCES AND TECHNOLOGY AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00201
title: FISH PORT (MUNICIPALITY OF CALABANGA, PROVINCE OF CAMARINES SUR)
long_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE CONSTRUCTION OF A FISH PORT IN BARANGAY SABANG, MUNICIPALITY OF CALABANGA, PROVINCE OF CAMARINES SUR AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE CONSTRUCTION OF A FISH PORT IN BARANGAY SABANG, MUNICIPALITY OF CALABANGA, PROVINCE OF CAMARINES SUR AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00202
title: AQUATIC RESEARCH AND EXPERIMENTAL BREEDING STATION (PROVINCE OF CAMARINES SUR)
long_title: AN ACT TO ESTABLISH AN AQUATIC RESEARCH AND EXPERIMENTAL BREEDING STATION FOR LAKE, RIVER AND OTHER INLAND FISHES IN THE THIRD DISTRICT OF THE PROVINCE OF CAMARINES SUR, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO ESTABLISH AN AQUATIC RESEARCH AND EXPERIMENTAL BREEDING STATION FOR LAKE, RIVER AND OTHER INLAND FISHES IN THE PROVINCE OF CAMARINES SUR, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00203
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTIONS 91 AND 97 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8550, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE PHILIPPINE FISHERIES CODE OF 1998
congress_website_abstract: Prohibits the fishing, catching, gathering, sale, purchase, possession, transport and exportation of rare, threatened or endangered species listed in Appendix I of the CITES (Convention on the International Trade in Endangered Species of Wild Fauna and Flora).

name: HBN-00204
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO PROVIDE THE REVIVAL OF ARBOR DAY BY VESTING IN PROVINCIAL, CITY AND MUNICIPAL GOVERNMENTS WITH THEIR COMPONENT BARANGAYS THE RESPONSIBILITIES FOR CELEBRATING THE DAY FOR TREE PLANTING AS AN ANNUAL EVENT
congress_website_abstract: Mandates all municipalities and cities to celebrate an Arbor Day at a fixed date every calendar year as may be deemed suitable according to the proper time and season of planting trees.

name: HBN-00205
congress_website_title: AN ACT IMPROVING PHILIPPINE COMMITMENT TO HUMAN RIGHTS PROMOTION AND PROTECTION BY PROVIDING THE NECESSARY MECHANISMS FOR THE PREVENTION OF THE OCCURRENCE AND THE PROTECTION FROM ADVERSE EFFECTS OF INTERNAL DISPLACEMENT AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Internal Displacement Act of 2010.” Seeks to embody the two-pronged approach of protection and assistance that is the moving spirit behind the United Nations Guiding Principles on Internal Displacement formulated by the United Nations Commission on Human Rights during its 54th session.

name: HBN-00226
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING SECURITY OF TENURE UNDER CERTAIN CONDITIONS TO GOVERNMENT EMPLOYEES WHOSE NATURE OF APPOINTMENT IS EITHER TEMPORARY OR CONTRACTUAL AND WHO HAVE RENDERED A TOTAL OF TEN YEARS OF EFFICIENT SERVICE
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to give permanent appointment to temporary or contractual employees who have continuously and efficiently served the government for at least ten (10) years and promote efficiency in the government service as frequent turnover of personnel in the government will be avoided.

name: HBN-00227
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE PHILIPPINE LEGISLATIVE ACADEMY, DEFINING ITS POWERS AND FUNCTIONS, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Establishes the Legislative Academy that shall serve as a training school for legislative staff officers and employees and other aspirants for positions in the Career Service of the Legislature.

name: HBN-00228
congress_website_title: AN ACT REGULATING THE PRACTICE OF ENVIRONMENTAL PLANNING, REPEALING FOR THE PURPOSE PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NUMBERED ONE THOUSAND THREE HUNDRED AND EIGHT (P.D. 1308), ENTITLED \"LAW REGULATING THE ENVIRONMENTAL PLANNING PROFESSION IN THE PHILIPPINES\", AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “New Environmental Planning Act” Seeks to address the need to have a clearer definition of the practice of environmental planning and its coverage, at the same time, expanding the academic courses that will be allowed to qualify in the examination process.

name: HBN-00229
title: BURIAL ASSISTANCE FOR MILITARY VETERANS
long_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE BURIAL ASSISTANCE FOR VETERANS FROM TEN THOUSAND PESOS (P10,000.00) TO TWENTY THOUSAND PESOS (P20,000.00), AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6948, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS AN ACT STANDARDIZING AND UPGRADING THE BENEFITS FOR MILITARY VETERANS AND THEIR DEPENDENTS
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE BURIAL ASSISTANCE FOR VETERANS FROM TEN THOUSAND (P10,000.00) TO TWENTY THOUSAND PESOS (P20,000.00), AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6948, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS \"AN ACT STANDARDIZING AND UPGRADING THE BENEFITS FOR MILITARY VETERANS AND THEIR DEPENDENTS\"
congress_website_abstract: Aims to help foster socio-economic security and general well-being of the country´s veterans in recognition of their patriotic service in times of war and peace.

name: HBN-00230
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING FREE HOSPITALIZATION BENEFITS IN GOVERNMENT HOSPITALS TO ALL RETIRED PUBLIC SCHOOL TEACHERS WHO HAVE RENDERED A MINIMUM OF TWENTY (20) YEARS IN SERVICE AND PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to provide all retired government teachers who have rendered a minimum of twenty (20) years of service free hospitalization benefits in all government hospitals, in recognition of their significant role in nation building and the country's socio-economic progress and in molding the youth to become responsible and productive members of society.

name: HBN-00231
congress_website_title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF PAGALANGGANG HIGH SCHOOL - ANNEX IN BARANGAY STA. LUCIA (PITA), MUNICIPALITY OF DINALUPIHAN, PROVINCE OF BATAAN, TO STA. LUCIA (PITA) NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL

name: HBN-00232
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING CERTAIN SECTIONS OF THE PHILIPPINE MERCHANT MARINE OFFICERS LAW
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to upgrade the marine profession by requiring the future marine officers and seafarers to undergo practical apprenticeship to be served on board seagoing vessels for a prescribed period and duly supervised by a qualified officer.

name: HBN-00233
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FREE MEDICAL SERVICES TO FILIPINO VETERANS AND RETIRED GOVERNMENT PERSONNEL IN GOVERNMENT-OWNED AND OPERATED HOSPITALS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Directs all government-owned and operated hospitals to provide free medical services to all Filipino veterans and retired government personnel.

name: HBN-00234
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR BARANGAY EMPOWERMENT, AMENDING VARIOUS PROVISIONS OF THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Barangay Empowerment Act of 2010\" Provides for the creation of a barangay building official in all barangays with a population of at least 3,000 inhabitants and it also proposes to give the barangay a bigger share in the proceeds of tax collected on extracted sand, gravel and other quarry resources.

name: HBN-00235
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 9 OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED THIRTY HUNDRED AND NINETEEN, AS AMENDED, ENTITLED \"ANTI-GRAFT AND CORRUPT PRACTICES ACT\"
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to penalize persons who benefit from the unlawful act of a public officer with imprisonment of six months to five years and forfeiture in favor of the government of all proceeds derived from such act.

name: HBN-00236
congress_website_title: AN ACT REDEFINING THE THIRD LEVEL POSITIONS IN THE CAREER CIVIL SERVICE
congress_website_abstract: Proposes the following qualification requirements for third level positions: a) appropriate academic and professional background; b) career service executive eligibility; c) holds a comparable or next in rank position in government; d) meets age requirement; and e) not disqualified under any existing law.

name: HBN-00237
congress_website_title: AN ACT EXPANDING THE AUTHORITY AND JURISDICTION OF THE OFFICE OF THE CIVIL REGISTRAR GENERAL THEREBY AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9048
congress_website_abstract: Authorizes the office of the Civil Registrar General to accept and act on petitions for conviction of erroneous entry or typographical errors concerning age and gender or sex of a person.

name: HBN-00238
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING FURTHER REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9340, \"AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9164, RESETTING THE BARANGAY AND SANGGUNIANG KABATAAN ELECTIONS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES\"
congress_website_abstract: Sets a synchronized barangay and sangguniang kabataan elections on the second Monday of October 2012 and every three (3) years thereafter, with the term of office to commence at noon of November 30 next following the elections.

name: HBN-00239
congress_website_title: AN ACT REMOVING THE INTERNAL REVENUE ALLOTMENT FROM THE METROPOLITAN MANILA DEVELOPMENT AUTHORITY (MMDA), AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7924, ENTITLED, \"AN ACT CREATING THE METROPOLITAN MANILA DEVELOPMENT AUTHORITY, DEFINING ITS POWERS AND FUNCTIONS, PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFORE AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Removes the entitlement of the Metropolitan Manila Development Authority (MMDA) to a share of the internal revenue allotment for the reason that MMDA is not created like a province, city, municipality and barangay as contemplated in the Local Government Code but it is a public corporation.

name: HBN-00240
congress_website_title: AN ACT DEVOLVING TO CITY AND MUNICIPAL GOVERNMENTS THE REGISTRATION OF FISHING VESSELS THREE GROSS TONNAGE AND BELOW AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Requires all city and municipal governments to register all fishing vessels with three (3) gross tonnages and below within their jurisdiction and subsequently furnish their respective regional offices of the Maritime Industry Authority (MARINA), the Philippine Coast Guard (PCG) station/detachment and the Department of Agriculture - Bureau of Fisheries and Aquatic Resources (DA-BFAR) for technical assistance, auxiliary support and training with respect to registration of such vessels.

name: HBN-00241
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A FILIPINO IDENTIFICATION SYSTEM AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Filipino Identification System Act\" Provides for a tamper-proof national ID card which may be used to transact with any government instrumentality without need of further proof as to a person's identity.

name: HBN-00242
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A COMPREHENSIVE STUDY-NOW-PAY-LATER PLAN AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: \"Comprehensive Study-Now-Pay-Later Program of 2010\" Provides the mechanism whereby poor but deserving students will be given the opportunity to acquire quality education and training.

name: HBN-00243
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING SUBSISTENCE ALLOWANCE TO PERSONS UNDERGOING VOCATIONAL AND/OR TECHNICAL TRAINING, PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Grants subsistence allowance in the form of food coupons to persons undergoing vocational and/or technical training under any government-sponsored training program.

name: HBN-00244
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING AND ESTABLISHING THE CENTER FOR STUDIES ON INDIGENOUS CULTURAL COMMUNITIES, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to protect and promote the rights of indigenous communities to ensure their economic, social and cultural well-being and provide and opportunity to both Muslims and non-Muslims to participate in national life and development.

name: HBN-00245
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE WORKERS COMPENSATION PROGRAM, THE WORK CONTINGENCY INSURANCE FUND, THE PHILIPPINE WORKERS COMPENSATION AUTHORITY AND DEFINING THEIR POWERS AND FUNCTIONS, AMENDING FOR THIS PURPOSE ARTICLES 166 TO 288-A OF TITLE 2 BOOK IV OF PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 442, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE \"LABOR CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES\", AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFORE
congress_website_abstract: \"Workers Compensation Act of 2010\" Renames the Employee's Compensation Program (ECP) to Workers Compensation Program thereby enhancing the effectiveness and efficiency of the implementation of the said program in it the work contingency prevention, as well as the rehabilitation of occupationally disabled workers.

name: HBN-00246
congress_website_title: AN ACT PENALIZING THE COMMISSION OF THE ACT OF \"KOTONG\" COMMITTED BY LAW ENFORCEMENT OFFICERS AND PUBLIC OFFICIALS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Anti-Kotong Act of 2010\" Institutes a policy whereby law enforcement officers and public officials who will be implicated in the unlawful act of \"kotong\" shall be penalized as well as encourage all concerned citizens to report such illegal activity to proper authorities.

name: HBN-00247
congress_website_title: COLLECTIVE INVESTMENT SCHEMES LAW
congress_website_abstract: \"Collective Investment Schemes Law\" Seeks to balance the interests of the investors, by incorporating mechanisms that would safeguard the pubic interest, at the same time recognizing the interests of the other parties involved in the CIS industry, by giving them flexibility to expand their CIS businesses.

name: HBN-00248
congress_website_title: AN ACT PRESCRIBING THE STRENGTHENING OF THE NATIONAL EXTENSION SYSTEM TO ACCELERATE AGRICULTURE AND FISHERIES DEVELOPMENT, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Agriculture and Fisheries Extension Act of 2010\" Establishes a more equitable access to assets, income, and support services and infrastructure to enable those who belong to the agriculture and fisheries sector to participate and share the fruits of development and growth in a manner that utilizes the nation's resources in the most efficient and sustainable way possible.

name: HBN-00249
congress_website_title: AN ACT ADOPTING A SALARY SCHEDULE FOR THE MEMBERS OF THE BENCH AND OTHER LAWYERS IN THE JUDICIARY, PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Aims to: a) raise the level of competence and ensure the integrity of the justices, judges and lawyers in the Judiciary, and; b) improve the compensation system for the members of the bench, including the court personnel, to be able to attract the best and the brightest to the Judiciary.

name: HBN-00250
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR INVESTMENT INCENTIVES TO ACCELERATE DEVELOPMENT IN MINDANAO, CREATING THE MINDANAO INCENTIVES DEVELOPMENT AUTHORITY FOR THIS PURPOSE, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00251
congress_website_title: AN ACT PRESCRIBING STRICTER PENALTIES ON THE CRIME OF DELIVERING PRISONERS FROM JAIL AND INFIDELITY IN THE CUSTODY OF PRISONERS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE ARTICLES 156, 223 AND 224 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3815, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE REVISED PENAL CODE, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Imposes stiffer penalties to public officials and employees in charge of custody of prisoners for their negligence, connivance with or consent to jail escapes.

name: HBN-00252
congress_website_title: AN ACT UPGRADING THE TABLON HEALTH CENTER IN BARANGAY TABLON, CAGAYAN DE ORO CITY INTO A TWENTY-FIVE (25) BED CAPACITY PRIMARY HOSPITAL AND BASIC EMERGENCY OBSTETRIC CARE (BEMOC) CENTER AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00253
title: J.R. BORJA CITY MEMORIAL HOSPITAL
long_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE UPGRADE AND MODERNIZATION OF THE J.R. BORJA CITY MEMORIAL HOSPITAL AS AN EXTENSION HOSPITAL OF THE NORTHERN MINDANAO MEDICAL CENTER (NMMC) IN CAGAYAN DE ORO CITY, PROVINCE OF MISAMIS ORIENTAL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE UPGRADE AND MODERNIZATION OF THE J.R. BORJA CITY MEMORIAL HOSPITAL AS AN EXTENSION HOSPITAL OF THE NORTHERN MINDANAO MEDICAL CENTER IN CAGAYAN DE ORO CITY, PROVINCE OF MISAMIS ORIENTAL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00254
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE LAPASAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL - GUSA ANNEX AND THE GUSA ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN BARANGAY GUSA, CITY OF CAGAYAN DE ORO, PROVINCE OF MISAMIS ORIENTAL INTO AN INTEGRATED NATIONAL SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS GUSA INTEGRATED NATIONAL ELEMENTARY AND HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00255
congress_website_title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE GUSA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL - CUGMAN ANNEX IN BARANGAY CUGMAN, CITY OF CAGAYAN DE ORO FROM THE GUSA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS CUGMAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00256
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE BALUBAL ROAD IN CAGAYAN DE ORO CITY TO ALAE IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MANOLO FORTICH, PROVINCE OF BUKIDNON INTO A NATIONAL ROAD

name: HBN-00257
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A NATIONWIDE SCHOOL FEEDING PROGRAM AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"National School Feeding Program of the Philippines\" Seeks to address the problem of malnutrition, declining scholastic performance and low cohort survival rate among school children.

name: HBN-00258
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 7 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9208 DISCLOSING THE NAME AND PERSONAL CIRCUMSTANCES OF THE ACCUSED IN A PENDING INVESTIGATION REGARDING HUMAN TRAFFICKING
congress_website_abstract: Aims to ensure that the public shall be high informed and warned among persons who are convicted or accused in a pending case for human trafficking.

name: HBN-00259
congress_website_title: AN ACT EXPANDING AND STRENGHTENING THE PHILIPPINE RICE RESEARCH INSTITUTE AND RENAMING IT TO THE PHILIPPINE RICE AND CEREALS RESEARCH AND DEVELOPMENT INSTITUTE (PhilRice)
congress_website_abstract: \"The Philippine Rice and Cereals Research and Development Institute (PhilRice) Act of 2010\" Creates the Philippine Cereal Research, Development and Extension Institute (PHILCEREAL), under the Department of Agriculture, which is authorized to collect certain percentage of the Competitiveness Enhancement Fund to finance its establishment and maintenance of research, development and extension facilities and equipment for cereals in the country.

name: HBN-00260
congress_website_title: AN ACT ABOLISHING THE AGE REQUIREMENT FOR APPLICANTS TAKING THE BOARD EXAMINATION FOR SOCIAL WORKERS, PROVIDING FOR THE CONTINUING SOCIAL WORK EDUCATION AND UPGRADING THE SUNDRY PROVISIONS RELATIVE TO THE PRACTICE OF SOCIAL WORK
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to give opportunity to young social work graduates to take the examination and become economically and socially productive by joining the workforce as professionals.

name: HBN-00261
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE NUMBER OF SANDIGANBAYAN DIVISIONS, AMENDING FOR THIS PURPOSE PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 1606, AS AMENDED, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Triples the current number of anti-graft court justices to ensure the speedy disposition of cases filed before the Sandiganbayan; and proposes that corruption cases involving P5 million or less shall be handled by just one justice.

name: HBN-00262
congress_website_title: AN ACT CURTAILING THE ILLEGAL ACTIVITIES OF RACKETEERS AND POWERFUL SYNDICATES IN THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: \"Racketeer-Influenced and Corrupt Organizations (RICO) Act of 2010\" Aims at preventing the use of money and power by organized crime syndicates to subvert and corrupt legitimate businesses by facilitating the prosecution of and imposing stiffer penalties for criminal offenders.

name: HBN-00263
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR PUBLIC SALE OF SHARES IN THE DISPOSITION OF GOVERNMENT CORPORATIONS UNDER THE PRIVATIZATION PROGRAM
congress_website_abstract: Encourages greater public participation in owning shares in the disposition of government corporations under the privatization program.

name: HBN-00264
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROHIBITING THE PRACTICE OF OFFERING, GIVING OR ATTEMPTING TO GIVE OR OFFER, OR ACCEPTING A KICKBACK IN ANY KIND OF COMMERCIAL TRANSACTIONS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Anti-Kickback Act” Seeks to vest law implementors with a complimentary tool to minimize kickbacks and eradicate the notion that people would go on doing their jobs.

name: HBN-00265
congress_website_title: AN ACT STRENGTHENING THE ROLE AND FUNCTIONS OF THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT UNITS IN IMPLEMENTING UNIVERSAL HEALTH CARE SYSTEM AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: “Universal Health Development Act of 2010” Seeks to define, establish and strengthen the indispensable role and functions of local government units on the delivery of health services in order to standardize the quality of services and thus ensure effective implementation of the universal health care system.

name: HBN-00286
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE DEPARTMENT OF EDUCATION DIVISION OFFICE OF COMPOSTELA VALLEY PROVINCE AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00287
title: COMPOSTELA VALLEY LTO OFFICE
long_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE LAND TRANSPORTATION OFFICE OF COMPOSTELA VALLEY PROVINCE AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE LAND TRANSPORTATION OFFICE OF COMPOSTELA VALLEY PROVINCE AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00288
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE REGISTRY OF DEEDS OF THE PROVINCE OF COMPOSTELA VALLEY AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00289
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING THE PORTION OF THE MT. TAGUB-KAMPALILI RANGES WITHIN MARAGUSAN, COMPOSTELA VALLEY PROVINCE AS A PROTECTED LANDSCAPE UNDER THE NATIONAL INTEGRATED PROTECTED AREAS SYSTEM

name: HBN-00290
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO ESTABLISH THE ORIENTAL MINDORO SPECIAL ECONOMIC ZONE AND FREEPORT IN THE PROVINCE OF ORIENTAL MINDORO, CREATING FOR THIS PURPOSE THE ORIENTAL MINDORO SPECIAL ECONOMIC ZONE AND FREEPORT AUTHORITY, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREOF AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00291
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 264 (a) OF THE NATIONAL INTERNAL REVENUE CODE OF 1997, AS AMENDED, AND PROVIDING PENALTIES THEREFOR

name: HBN-00292
congress_website_title: AN ACT EXEMPTING THE BUREAU OF INTERNAL REVENUE AND BUREAU OF CUSTOMS FROM THE COVERAGE OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6758, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE SALARY STANDARDIZATION LAW WITH THEIR ANNUAL COLLECTIONS TO BE USED AS BASIS FOR SALARIES AND BONUSES OF OFFICIALS AND EMPLOYEES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00293
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE RATE OF DUTY ON IMPORTED TOBACCO, CIGARETTE PAPER, TIPPING PAPER AND FILTER RODS USED IN MAKING CIGARS AND CIGARETTES, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE CERTAIN TARIFF HEADINGS OF THE TARIFF AND CUSTOMS CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES, AS AMENDED

name: HBN-00294
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 220. CHAPTER II. TITLE VIII OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8424 AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00295
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE NATIONAL GAMING COMMISSION, PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00296
congress_website_title: AN ACT REGULATING HARBOR PILOTAGE SERVICES AND THE CONDUCT OF HARBOR PILOTS IN ALL PORTS IN THE PHILIPPINES AND FOR RELATED PURPOSES

name: HBN-00297
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE DEMOCRATIZATION OF PUBLIC SCHOOL EDUCATION

name: HBN-00298
congress_website_title: AN ACT LIBERALIZING AND ACCELERATING THE PROCESSING AND DEPLOYMENT OF OVERSEAS FILIPINO CONTRACT WORKERS, AND APPROPRIATING THE NECESSARY FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00299
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE PHILIPPINE TRANSPORTATION SECURITY AUTHORITY, AUTHORIZING THE APPROPRIATION OF FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00300
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 4 AND CHAPTER VI OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8550 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE FISHERIES CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES OF 1998

name: HBN-00301
congress_website_title: AN ACT IMPLEMENTING THE RIGHT OF THE PEOPLE TO INFORMATION ON MATTERS OF PUBLIC CONCERN GUARANTEED UNDER SECTION SEVEN, ARTICLE THREE OF THE 1987 CONSTITUTION AND THE STATE POLICY OF FULL PUBLIC DISCLOSURE OF ALL ITS TRANSACTIONS INVOLVING PUBLIC INTEREST UNDER SECTION TWENTY-EIGHT, ARTICLE TWO OF THE 1987 CONSTITUTION, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00302
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING COMPENSATION TO VICTIMS OF HUMAN RIGHTS VIOLATIONS DURING THE MARCOS REGIME, DOCUMENTATION OF SAID VIOLATIONS, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00303
congress_website_title: AN ACT STRENGTHENING THE SECURITY OF TENURE OF WORKERS IN THE PRIVATE SECTOR, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE ARTICLES 248, 279, 280, 281 AND 288, AND INTRODUCING NEW ARTICLES 106, 106-A, 106-B, 106-C, 106-D, 106-E, 280-A AND 280-B TO PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 442, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LABOR CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES

name: HBN-00304
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE MUNICIPALITY OF CATARMAN IN THE PROVINCE OF NORTHERN SAMAR INTO A COMPONENT CITY TO BE KNOWN AS THE CITY OF CATARMAN

name: HBN-00305
congress_website_title: AN ACT MANDATORILY CREATING THE POSITION OF THE MUNICIPAL GENERAL SERVICES OFFICER, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE BOOK III, TITLE TWO, CHAPTER 2, SECTION 443(a) OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991

name: HBN-00266
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTIONALIZING A NATIONAL RAILWAY SYSTEM IN THE PHILIPPINES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Philippine National Railway Act of 2010” Seeks to ensure an efficient and effective mass transport system nationwide that will facilitate the movement of people, goods and services around the country.

name: HBN-00267
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING CERTAIN PROVISIONS OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8293, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE \"INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES\", AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to provide an internet environment where it is safe to distribute and license protected materials thus ensuring the effective protection and development of intellectual property.

name: HBN-00268
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE AUTOMATIC RETENTION BY THE BARANGAY OF ITS SHARE OF FIFTY PERCENT (50%) IN THE COMMUNITY TAX COLLECTED BY SAID BARANGAY, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 164 OF R.A. NO. 7160, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991
congress_website_abstract: Amends Section 164 of the Local Government Code of 1991 so that the barangay treasurer concerned shall automatically retain the fifty (50%) per cent share of the barangay in the community tax collected and remit the share of the city or municipality within ten (10) days after the end of each month.

name: HBN-00269
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING INCLUSION OF ENTREPRENEURSHIP AS A SEPARATE SUBJECT IN THE HIGH SCHOOL CURRICULUM
congress_website_abstract: Mandates the inclusion of entrepreneurship as a separate subject at the high school level in all public and private educational institutions nationwide, such appropriate skills and values training at the early age is crucial in achieving a paradigm shift.

name: HBN-00270
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE MANDATORY STUDY OF MORO HISTORY, CULTURE AND IDENTITY IN THE CURRICULA OF ALL LEVELS OF SCHOOLS IN THE COUNTRY
congress_website_abstract: “Moro History, Culture and Identity Studies Act” Mandates for the inclusion of the study and understanding of Moro history, culture and identity in the curricula of all levels of education and training in all schools in the country, starting in Mindanao, adopting the scope and treatment of the subjects or courses to the respective educational levels.

name: HBN-00271
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING AN EDUCATION TRUST FUND FOR GRANTEES OF GSIS AND SSS MEMBERS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Education Trust Fund Act” Seeks to broaden opportunities and promote education as an accessible equalizer through the partnership of the government and the private sector , making it an effective instrument in improving the life of the majority of the Filipino people.

name: HBN-00272

congress_website_abstract: \"Art Forgeries Act of 2010\" Aims to give more exacting definitions to the crime of art forgery to eliminate much confusion as it clearly spells out the specific act that would constitute the crime.

congress_website_abstract: Seeks to improve the quality of tertiary education in the country by means of increasing the capability and competence of teachers by expanding the existing provisions of RA07784, to include in the said program teachers in the tertiary level.

congress_website_abstract: “The Ease of Dealing with Government Act of 2010” Aims to consolidate all existing government-initiated identification system in one integrated and multi-purpose system without compromising the citizens´ right to privacy and facilitate speedy, accurate and simplified processes and procedures of transacting with the government.

name: HBN-00277

congress_website_abstract: Encourages the non-government sectors to fully support and provide the much needed relief to the non-profit and non-stock educational institutions by granting full tax exemption and tax credits to these willing benefactors.
